1000605008.english: - I began to command the battle with trembling hands.
1000605008.korean: - 나는 덜덜 떨리는 손으로 전투를 지휘하기 시작했다.

1000605010.english: It is truly a relief... With this antidote, you will surely be able to get up and move within half a day.
1000605010.korean: 정말 다행이옵니다... 이 해독제라면, 분명 반나절 내에 자리를 털고 일어나실&n수 있을 것이옵니다.

1000605011.english: That's a relief, that's a relief... I'm sorry, Master...

1000605012.english: Hmph, Master, you are not the type to collapse from something like this. You are worrying for nothing.
1000605012.korean: 흥, 주인님은 이정도로 쓰러질 분은 아닙니다. 괜한 걱정입니다.

1000605013.english: - ...Is this the effect of the antidote?

1000605014.english: - I could feel my stomach, which had completely lost all sensation after far exceeding the pain threshold, gradually recovering.
1000605014.korean: - 고통의 한계치를 까마득하게 넘겨버려 이젠 감각조차 없던 위장이 조금씩 회복되는 것을 느낄 수 있었다.

1000605015.english: Really? Master, you're really okay now, aren't you?
1000605015.korean: 정말이에요? 주인님, 정말로 괜찮아지신 거 맞죠?

1000605016.english: - I felt sorry for Hachiko, who was fidgeting and unable to take her eyes off me for a single moment, so I stroked her head.
1000605016.korean: - 내게서 한시도 눈을 떼지 못하고 안절부절하던 하치코가 안쓰러워 머리를 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000605018.english: Hahaha... Master's body is like that of a superhuman.
1000605018.korean: 후후... 주인의 육신은 마치 초인과도 같사옵니다.

1000605020.english: I have work to do, so I would appreciate it if someone else could take charge of the cooking.
1000605020.korean: 소첩은 해야 할 일이 있으니, 요리는 다른분이 맡아주셨으면 좋겠사옵니다.

1000605021.english: I thought you would be the first to jump on the bandwagon when it comes to cooking.
1000605021.korean: 요리라면 당신이 제일 먼저 달려들 줄 알았는데요?

1000605022.english: It is a matter of greater importance. Master, I will be leaving for a moment.
1000605022.korean: 그보다 더욱 중요한 일이옵니다. 주인, 소첩은 잠시 자리를 비우겠사옵니다.

1000605023.english: - Sowan took Hachiko, who still had tears welling up in the corners of her eyes, and disappeared somewhere.
1000605023.korean: - 소완은 아직도 눈꼬리에 눈물 방울이 맺혀있는 하치코를 데리고 어디론가 사라졌다.

1000605024.english: What a surprise... Ahem. Then, Master, is there anything in particular you would like to eat?
1000605024.korean: 별일이 다 있군요... &n흠흠. 그럼 주인님, 특별히 드시고 싶은 거라도 있나요?

1000605025.english: ...You don't need to worry about me so much. I am a maid at Saman, and I can handle any dish without any trouble. There is no need...
1000605025.korean: ...그렇게 저를 신경쓰시지 않으셔도 됩니다. 저도 삼안의 메이드,&n어떤 요리든 문제 없이 해낼 수 있습니다. 굳이...

1000605026.english: ...If that is the case, there is nothing I can do.

1000605027.english: If that is what you want, Master, I will do my best as well.
1000605027.korean: 주인님이 그렇게 원하신다면, 저도 최선을 다하겠습니다.

1000605028.english: - As Vanilla disappeared, all the strength drained from my body. ...It was quite a tough day.
1000605028.korean: - 바닐라가 모습을 감추자 전신에 힘이 탁 풀렸다.&n...꽤나 힘든 하루였다.

1000605029.english: - I was able to hear the story of what happened after that day from Vanilla.
1000605029.korean: - 나는 바닐라에게서 그날 이후의 이야기를 들을 수 있었다.

1000605030.english: Sowan taught Hachiko the most important things she needed to know as a chef.
1000605030.korean: 소완은 하치코에게 요리사로서 알아야 할 가장 중요한 것들을 알려 주었습니다.

1000605031.english: So, Master, you can rest assured now.

1000605033.english: Seeing that you are worried... it seems you are definitely fine now.
1000605033.korean: 그런 걱정을 하시는걸 보니... 확실히 멀쩡해지신 것 같습니다.

1000605034.english: Ah, Hachiko is coming just in time.

1000605035.english: Master! Hachiko learned a lot from Sowan!
1000605035.korean: 주인님! 하치코는 소완 언니한테 많이 배웠어요!

1000605036.english: Hehe... I won't make the same mistake as last time.
1000605036.korean: 헤헤... 이제 저번같은 실수는 하지 않을 거예요.

1000605037.english: Master... you will trust me this time too, right?

1000605038.english: Well then, Hachiko! I'll be back!

1000605039.english: - A tense atmosphere fills the bridge of the Orca.

1000605040.english: - Passing through a place swarming with Iron Bugs in search of the best ingredients, Hachiko finally succeeded in putting some ingredients in her front pocket.
1000605040.korean: - 최고의 식재료를 찾기 위해 철충이 득실거리는 곳을 지나, &n하치코는 마침내 몇몇 재료를 앞주머니에 담아오는데 성공했다.

1000605041.english: - The other maids seemed quite concerned that Hachiko might make a mistake during the cooking process or get hurt emotionally.
1000605041.korean: - 다른 메이드들은 하치코가 요리 과정에서 실수하거나, 마음에 상처를 입지 않을까 꽤나 신경 쓰는 모습이었다.

1000605042.english: Ahh~ That was tough... I want to eat something delicious too... Hey, Commander. Are you listening?
1000605042.korean: 아아~ 힘들었어... 나도 맛있는 거 먹고 싶은데... 저기, 사령관. 듣고 있어?

1000605044.english: Then... what Hachiko is making must be a meat pie, right?
1000605044.korean: 그러면... 하치코가 만들고 있는건 분명 미트 파이겠지?

1000605045.english: Hmm... I'll pass. Enjoy your meal. And hang in there.
1000605045.korean: 음... 난 사양할게. 맛있게 먹어. 힘내구.

1000605046.english: Done! You've waited a long time, haven't you, Master?

1000605047.english: Hachiko's Pie! What's inside is a secret!
1000605047.korean: 하치코의 파이! 안에 뭐가 들었는지는 비밀이에요!

1000605048.english: - It ended up being another pie, but the aroma is quite nice and stimulates the appetite.
1000605048.korean: - 결국 또 파이였지만, 제법 괜찮은 향이 식욕을 자극한다.

1000605049.english: Hmm... I kind of expected it, but... just as I thought.

1000605051.english: - Hachiko's pie was filled with lean canned tuna.
1000605051.korean: - 하치코의 파이 속에는 캔참치의 살코기가 가득 들어있었다.

1000605052.english: This is the safest food for you, Master! It's packed with nutrients, so don't worry and eat lots and lots!
1000605052.korean: 이건 주인님께 제일 안전한 음식이에요! 영양제도 듬뿍 들어있으니, 걱정말고 많이 많이 드세요~!

1000605053.english: Haa, so it's tuna in the end? Master, you just can't escape from tuna until the very end.
1000605053.korean: 하아, 결국 참치인가요? &n주인님은 마지막까지 참치에게서 벗어나시지 못하시는군요.

1000605055.english: - Looking back, the reason Sowan came here was also related to tuna.
1000605055.korean: - 돌이켜 보면, 소완이 오게 된 계기도 참치와 관련이 있었지.

1000605056.english: Once Master fully recovers, Hachiko can do other things for you too!
1000605056.korean: 주인님이 완전히 회복되시면 하치코가 다른것도 해드릴 수 있어요~!

1000605057.english: As Hachiko said, it would be best to quietly eat only that for the time being.
1000605057.korean: 하치코의 말대로 당분간은 얌전히 그것만 드시는 게 좋을 것 같습니다.

1000605058.english: - Why do I have to eat canned tuna when I have the best ingredients and chefs...
1000605058.korean: - 어째서 최고의 식재료와 요리사를 두고도 나는 통조림 참치를 먹어야만 하는걸까...

1000605059.english: Master, Master! How is it? Is it delicious?

1000605060.english: - I stuffed a tuna pie into my mouth, thinking that it might be a good idea to hold another competition.
1000605060.korean: - 또다른 대회를 열어보는 것도 괜챃을 것 같다는 생각을 하며 참치파이를 입 속에 밀어 넣었다.

1000605061.english: - A luxurious table set by the maids.

1000605062.english: - A scene that anyone would dream of is unfolding before my eyes.
1000605062.korean: - 누구나 꿈꿀법한 풍경이 눈앞에 펼쳐져 있다.

1000605064.english: Master. Here is the steak I prepared. To be accompanied by wine...
1000605064.korean: 주인님. 제가 준비한 스테이크입니다. 와인을 곁들여...

1000605068.english: Hehe... My concubine's... to present to my master

1000605070.english: - It's always like this these days.

1000605071.english: - Endless boredom. I was slowly growing weary of the boredom with taste.
1000605071.korean: - 끝없는 권태. 맛에 대한 권태로 나는 서서히 지쳐가고 있었다.

1000605072.english: - After confirming that the maids had left their posts, I started grumbling to myself.
1000605072.korean: - 메이드들이 자리를 비운 것을 확인한 나는 속으로 투덜대기 시작했다.

1000605073.english: - I'm tired of ordinary menus. I... I... want to... something a bit more... how should I put it...
1000605073.korean: - 평범한 메뉴에는 이제 질렸어. 나는... 나는... 좀 더... 뭐랄까...

1000605074.english: - Unable to find a suitable answer myself, I returned to the captain's quarters feeling stifled.
1000605074.korean: - 스스로도 마땅한 대답을 찾을 수 없었던 나는 가슴이 답답해져 함장실로 돌아갔다.

1000605075.english: Heehee... I wonder if Master dislikes Hachiko Pie?
1000605075.korean: 히잉... 주인님은 하치코 파이를 싫어하시는 걸까?

1000605076.english: Hachiko, Master is tired of the ordinary diet.

1000605077.english: A maid should be able to predict a situation like this.
1000605077.korean: 메이드라면 이 정도 상황은 예측할 수 있어야지.

1000605078.english: But Master said Hachiko Pie is the tastiest in the world...
1000605078.korean: 그치만, 주인님은 하치코 파이가 세상에서 제일 맛있다고 하셨는걸...

1000605079.english: ...It can be helped. For the time being, I have no choice but to find new dishes and ingredients to serve you, Master...
1000605079.korean: ...어쩔 수 없사옵니다. 당분간은 주인께 대접할 새로운 요리와 재료를 찾는 수밖에...

1000605080.english: ...But if even that fails to satisfy Master...

1000605081.english: ...If you can't do it? What are you thinking?

1000605082.english: I need a 'New Hachiko Pie' for my master!

1000605083.english: It would be best to continue the detailed story after I return.
1000605083.korean: 자세한 이야기는 다녀와서 계속 하는 것이 좋겠사옵니다.

1000605084.english: Master, Master! Hachiko worked hard to prepare something new for you!
1000605084.korean: 주인님주인님! 하치코가 주인님께 새로운 걸 드리고 싶어서 열심히 준비했어요!

1000605085.english: - Hachiko's admirable intentions were conveyed. However, I still don't feel like eating anything.
1000605085.korean: - 하치코의 갸륵한 마음은 전해졌다. 하지만 난 여전히 뭔가를 먹고 싶은&n마음이 들지 않는다.

1000605086.english: - My wrist, as I waved my hand to indicate refusal, had become surprisingly thin, even to myself.
1000605086.korean: - 거절의 뜻으로 손을 젓는 내 팔목은 스스로도 놀라울 만큼 가늘어져 있었다.

1000605087.english: Master... if I'm picky about food, I get sick... If you get sick, Hachiko...
1000605087.korean: 주인님... 음식을 가리면 몸이 아파요... 주인님이 아프시면 하치코는...

1000605088.english: - ...I'm sick of it. Something tastier. I want to eat something tastier.
1000605088.korean: - ...질렸어. 더 맛있는 것. 난 더 맛있는 음식이 먹고 싶다.

1000605089.english: - The fact that there is no one in this vast Orca to understand me made me depressed.
1000605089.korean: - 이 넓은 오르카에 나를 이해해 줄 누군가가 없다는 사실이 나를 우울하게 만들었다.

1000605091.english: - I want to go into the captain's quarters, lock the door, and be alone. No one knows how I feel...
1000605091.korean: - 함장실로 들어가 문을 잠그고 혼자 있고 싶다. 아무도 내 마음을 몰라...

1000605092.english: Master, before you eat the food I prepared, Sowan says she has something to tell you.
1000605092.korean: 주인님. 제가 준비한 음식을 드시기 전에, 소완이 드릴 말씀이 있다고 합니다.

1000605093.english: have determined that 'something' is needed to stimulate Master's appetite.
1000605093.korean: 소첩은 주인의 식욕증진을 위한 '무언가'가 필요할 거라 판단했사옵니다.

1000605095.english: - Perrault placed the 'black tea' in front of me with swift and elegant movements.
1000605095.korean: - 페로는 날래고 우아한 동작으로 내 앞에 '홍차'를 내놓았다.

1000605096.english: - Right. I was too lazy to even chew food, so I barely managed to moisten my mouth with the 'black tea' Perrault gave me.
1000605096.korean: - 그래. 음식을 씹는 것조차 귀찮았던 나는 페로가 내준 '홍차'로 간신히 입안을&n적셨다.

1000605097.english: - A rich aroma fills the mouth.
1000605097.korean: - 입 안 가득 풍부한 향이 퍼진다.

1000605099.english: ...All of this is for my frail Master... Please forgive me, Master.
1000605099.korean: ...이 모든 것은 허약해져 가는 주인님을 위한 일... 저를 용서해 주세요, 주인님.

1000605100.english: - I took a few more sips of black tea and repeated Perrault's words.
1000605100.korean: - 나는 '홍차'를 몇 번 더 홀짝이며 페로의 말을 되뇌었다.

1000605102.english: - Amidst the rich aroma of black tea, an unforgettable scent wafted out.
1000605102.korean: - 홍차의 그윽한 향 속에서, 잊을 수 없는 향이 한 줄기 새어나왔다.

1000605103.english: - I dropped the teacup without realizing it. With the sound of the cup shattering, I barely realized what the 'something' Sowan had mentioned and the 'forgiveness' Perrault had mentioned meant.
1000605103.korean: - 나도 모르게 찻잔을 떨어뜨렸다. 잔이 깨지는 소리와 함께 소완이 말한 '무언가'와 페로가 말한 '용서'가 무엇을 뜻하는지 간신히 알아차렸다.

1000605104.english: - But it was too late. As my eyelids grew heavy, an unbearable hunger struck.
1000605104.korean: - 하지만 모든 게 늦었다. 눈꺼풀이 무거워짐과 동시에 참을 수 없는 허기가&n찾아왔다.

1000605105.english: ... I have sworn an oath, so I could not offer tea to my master.
1000605105.korean: ... 소첩은 맹세한 바가 있어, 주인께 차를 드릴 수 없었사옵니다.

1000605106.english: But... if it were Miss Perrault instead of me... wouldn't it be possible?
1000605106.korean: 하지만... 제가 아니라 페로 양이라면... 가능하지 않겠사옵니까?

1000605107.english: Master won't mind such trivial matters.
1000605107.korean: 주인님은 그런 사소한 일엔 신경 쓰지 않으실 겁니다.

1000605108.english: - Perrault ran her hand through her hair and feigned indifference.

1000605110.english: Master, Master! Hachiko made a meat pie! Would you like a piece?
1000605110.korean: 주인님주인님! 하치코가 미트 파이를 만들었어요! 한 조각 드시겠어요?

1000605111.english: - Ah... Meat pie... My favorite food...
1000605111.korean: - 아아... 미트파이... 내가 가장 사랑하는 음식...

1000605112.english: Hehe, I'm so glad you're getting well, Master! I'll get another one ready right away!
1000605112.korean: 헤헷, 주인님이 건강해져서 너무 좋아요! 얼른 하나 더 준비해 올게요!

1000605113.english: Master, would you like some steak?

1000605114.english: Yes. I will prepare it and bring it up right away, Master.

1000605116.english: Master, you are more important than all of our lives. Therefore...
1000605116.korean: 주인께선 저희 모두의 목숨보다 중요한 분이시옵니다. 그러니...

1000605117.english: We sincerely hope that you enjoy the food we have prepared with great care and regain your health. And...
1000605117.korean: 부디 저희가 정성 들여 준비한 음식을 드시고 건강해 지시기를 바라옵니다. 그리고...

1000605118.english: I cannot overlook your complaining about the side dishes.

1000605119.english: - My complaining about side dishes has come to an end.

1000605122.english: - I don't have a younger sister.

1000605124.english: - ...Is she a doctor? Anyway, calling me 'Oppa'...

1000605125.english: - While thinking about the need to sort out titles within the Orca, I was squeezed by the Doctor's mechanical arm and involuntarily let out a strange sound.
1000605125.korean: - 오르카 내에서의 호칭 정리의 필요성에 대해 생각하다 닥터의 기계 팔에 쥐여짜여 나도모르게 괴상한 소리를 냈다.

1000605126.english: You know, I have something I'm upset about with you, oppa.
1000605126.korean: 난 있지, 오빠한테 서운한 게 있어.

1000605127.english: - I can't figure out the situation at all.

1000605128.english: How can you leave me and the other older sisters out? That's so mean!
1000605128.korean: 나랑 다른 언니들만 쏙 빼놓고 그러기 있어? 너무해!

1000605129.english: Hehe, I was watching everything, you know? The Doctor was right, you know? And us 'Engineers' couldn't even attend the cooking competition, you know?
1000605129.korean: 후훗, 누나는 다 보고 있었거든? 닥터 말이 맞거든?&n우리 '엔지니어' 들은 요리 대회에 참석도 못 했거든?

1000605130.english: We cherish and love the Commander very much, too...

1000605131.english: Right? Should I say... that it's a bit disappointing? Right, Tapdol?
1000605131.korean: 그렇죠? 뭔가... 서운하다고 해야 할까요? 그렇지 탑돌아?

1000605132.english: - Tapdori... I think that's the name of the robot Gremlin is holding. Well... it doesn't look like a particularly cute machine.
1000605132.korean: - 탑돌이... 그렘린이 안고 있는 저 로봇의 이름인 것 같다.&n뭐… 딱히 귀여운 구석은 없어 보이는 기계다.

1000605133.english: That's right. Since you're the commander, can't you include us too? Please!
1000605133.korean: 맞아. 오빠는 사령관이니까. 우리도 끼워주면 안 돼?&n부탁할게!

1000605134.english: Our commander, can you lend me your ear for a moment?
1000605134.korean: 우리 사령관, 잠깐 귀 좀 빌려줄래?

1000605135.english: It seems our little 'engineers' were disappointed too, since they wanted the commander's attention but couldn't get it.
1000605135.korean: 우리 '엔지니어' 꼬마들도, 사령관의 관심을 받고 싶었는데 그러질 못해서 서운했나 봐.

1000605136.english: Our commander can take care of this, right? For example... something like a cooking competition?
1000605136.korean: 우리 사령관이 해결해줄 수 있지? 예를 들면... 요리 대회 같은 거?

1000605137.english: But... if I don't do this, Oppa...

1000605138.english: - I twisted my body and barely managed to escape the doctor's 'mechanical grip'.
1000605138.korean: - 난 몸을 비틀어서 간신히 닥터의 '기계 손아귀'에서 빠져나왔다.

1000605140.english: Oh my goodness? The commander is totally cool!

1000605141.english: - I didn't realize there were bioroids who felt alienated during the last commotion... As the commander, I feel a sense of responsibility.
1000605141.korean: - 저번 소동에서 소외감을 느낀 바이오로이드들이 있었을 줄은...&n사령관으로서 책임감이 느껴진다.

1000605142.english: - My memory of the cooking competition is already hazy, but I guess I'll have to try to recall it to get through it.
1000605142.korean: - 이미 요리대회에 대한 기억은 희미하지만, 기억을 더듬어서 진행해 봐야겠군.

1000605143.english: Wow! As expected, you're the best, oppa!

1000605144.english: Then, what about the cooking theme and the judges?

1000605145.english: - … I'm flustered. What on earth should I order?

1000605146.english: Huh? Huh? Who are you? Wait, come on~
1000605146.korean: 응? 응? 넌 누구니? 잠깐, 아이참~

1000605147.english: Greetings! I am Police Officer Pubhead. And no less... Grade 6! I am a civil servant.
1000605147.korean: 안녕하신가! 이몸은 경찰 공무원 펍헤드라고 하네.&n자그마치... 6급! 공무원이지.

1000605148.english: Oh my? It's the cute Pupp Head. What brings you here?
1000605148.korean: 어머? 귀여운 펍 헤드거든? 여긴 무슨 일로 왔니?

1000605149.english: I have decided to attend the cooking competition representing Orca's AGS.
1000605149.korean: 이몸은 오르카의 AGS들을 대표해서 요리대회에 참석하기로 했다네.

1000605150.english: I shall serve as the judge. What a weighty mission! I will absolutely not neglect it. The Commander, please take care of the rest.
1000605150.korean: 이 몸이 심사위원을 맡도록 하지. 이런 막중한 임무! 절대 소홀히 하지 않겠네.&n나머지는 사령관이 알아서 해주시게.

1000605151.english: - Is the judge for the engineer cooking competition AGS? It seems like a great combination... Anyway, I'm glad my workload has decreased.
1000605151.korean: - 엔지니어 요리대회에, 심사위원은 AGS 인가. 조합이 훌륭한 것 같기도 하고...&n어찌 되었든, 내가 할 일이 줄어서 다행이다.

1000605152.english: That's right! Then I'll ask for the best dish for the AGS!
1000605152.korean: 옳지! 그럼 AGS를 위한 최고의 요리를 부탁하겠네!

1000605153.english: Hmm, I could do that with my eyes closed, you know? I already have a spot in mind.
1000605153.korean: 흐음, 그정도는 누나 눈 감고도 할 수 있거든? 벌써 점찍어 놓은 곳이 있으니까.

1000605154.english: I'm fine, too! Let's go, Tapdol!

1000605155.english: - … I don't know what answer Tapdori gave, so I just laugh it off.
1000605155.korean: - …난 탑돌이가 어떤 대답을 했는지 알 수 없으니 대충 웃어넘길 뿐이다.

1000605156.english: - Anyway, a sense of taste for a Pupp Head... Did he even have such a function...?
1000605156.korean: - 그나저나 펍 헤드에게 미각이라니... 그런 기능이 있었나…?

1000605157.english: Oppa, I'm the first one here! And this is heavy, so be careful not to get crushed.
1000605157.korean: 오빠, 내가 제일 먼저 왔어! 그리고 이거 무거우니까 깔리지 않도록 조심해야 해.

1000605158.english: This is no problem at all~ I'm all ready too.
1000605158.korean: 이 정도는 문제 없다구요~ 저도 준비 끝났어요.

1000605159.english: - Amidst the piles of ingredients, a very suspicious-looking piece of metal is exuding an undeniable presence.
1000605159.korean: - 가득 쌓인 식재료 사이로 굉장히 수상하게 생긴 쇳덩이가 숨길 수 없는 존재감을 내뿜고 있다.

1000605160.english: Sister... you're late, you know? But this 'battery' is really perfect!
1000605160.korean: 누나... 늦었거든? 그렇지만 이 '배터리'는 정말 완벽하거든!

1000605161.english: - Fortune brought an identical piece of metal too… By the way, a battery?
1000605161.korean: - 포츈도 똑같이 생긴 쇳덩이를 가져 왔다… 그나저나 배터리?

1000605162.english: - The battery, which was as big as Pupp Head's torso, overwhelmed me just by its size. But the important thing right now is whether that can actually be called food.
1000605162.korean: - 펍 헤드의 몸통만한 배터리는 크기부터 나를 압도했다. &n하지만 지금 중요한 건 저걸 과연 음식이라고 할 수 있느냐 하는 문제다.

1000605163.english: Alright! I'm first! Of course, I'll be the winner, right?
1000605163.korean: 자! 내가 먼저야! 물론 내가 우승이겠지?

1000605164.english: Very good! First, I’ll taste what the Doctor prepared!
1000605164.korean: 아주 좋네! 우선 닥터가 준비한 것부터 맛을 보겠네!

1000605165.english: Oh...! This refreshing taste spreading so abundantly... isn't this electricity generated from wind power?! What a magnificent reward!
1000605165.korean: 오오...! 한가득 퍼지는 청량한 이 맛은... 풍력발전으로 얻은 전기가 아닌가?!&n훌륭한 포상이로군!

1000605166.english: - I have a bad feeling about this. This isn't a cooking competition, and it's not a place I should be attending.
1000605166.korean: - 감이 좋지 않다. 이건 요리 대회도 아니고, 내가 참석할 자리도 아니다.

1000605167.english: Where are you going? Judge, please have a taste.
1000605167.korean: 어딜 가는 겐가? 심사위원, 어서 시식을 해보시게.

1000605168.english: - The Pupp Head used a stun gun to force me to 'taste' it.
1000605168.korean: - 펍 헤드는 스턴건을 사용해서 나를 강제로 '시식' 시켰다.

1000605170.english: - ... By the time I barely managed to regain my senses, it was already Gremlin's turn.
1000605170.korean: - ... 내가 가까스로 정신을 차렸을 땐 벌써 그렘린의 차례였다.

1000605171.english: Um, so... I'm a bit embarrassed, but please take care of me.

1000605172.english: Ahhh...! This refreshing taste filling my whole body... Hydroelectric power?! Absolutely fantastic!
1000605172.korean: 캬아...! 몸 속 가득 시원한 이맛은... 수력발전?! 아주 훌륭해!

1000605173.english: Oh, the judge has woken up! Go ahead and have a taste. Don't be shy.
1000605173.korean: 오, 심사위원이 깨어났군! 어서 시식해보게. 사양하지 말고.

1000605177.english: Hehe, enough everyone~ My little ones went a bit too far with their pranks, you know?
1000605177.korean: 후후, 다들 이제 그만~ 우리 동생들도 장난이 너무 심했거든?

1000605178.english: - I was able to regain my senses only after hearing Fortune's gentle voice.
1000605178.korean: - 나는 포츈의 부드러운 목소리를 듣고서야 다시 정신을 차릴 수 있었다.

1000605179.english: My little brothers~ Now you have to apologize to the Commander, right?

1000605180.english: Um... Oppa, I'm sorry for being mean... Are you okay?
1000605180.korean: 음... 오빠, 내가 심술부려서 미안해... 괜찮아?

1000605181.english: - I can't think of the right words...

1000605182.english: Still, Commander, please rest assured that if you break down, we can fix it for you!
1000605182.korean: 그래도 사령관님이 고장나면 저희가 고쳐드릴 수 있으니 안심하세요!

1000605183.english: Then I'll escort our Commander, okay? See you next time, little ones~
1000605183.korean: 그럼 우리 사령관님은 언니가 모셔다 드릴거거든? 동생들은 다음에 봐~

1000605184.english: - ... As the tension eases, consciousness gradually fades.

1000605185.english: Hehehe... From now on, I'm planning to get back exactly what our commander neglected you, big sister, you know?
1000605185.korean: 우후후... 지금부터 우리 사령관이 누나한테 소홀했던 것만큼 돌려받을 생각이거든?

1000605186.english: You can totally look forward to today! Hehe.

1000605188.english: I will take care of the rest. Please stay put.
1000605188.korean: 나머지는 제가 정리 하겠습니다. 얌전히 있어 주세요.

1000605189.english: - The maids are carrying food to the table with elegant movements.
1000605189.korean: - 메이드들은 우아한 동작으로 식탁에 음식을 나르고 있다.

1000605190.english: Hahaha... My master's happiness is the supreme pleasure to me.
1000605190.korean: 후후... 주인의 행복이야말로 소첩에겐 지고의 쾌락이옵니다.

1000605191.english: - Yeah... I just have to enjoy this life. The best time allowed to me...
1000605191.korean: - 그래... 난 이 생활을 즐기기만 하면 돼. 내게 허락된 최고의 시간...

1000605193.english: - With my mouth full of meat, I casually looked at the monitor and saw Brownie leaning against the inner wall pipe, hurriedly eating—no, drinking—canned food.
1000605193.korean: - 입 안 가득 고기를 물고 무심코 쳐다본 모니터에는 내벽 파이프에 기댄 채로 허겁지겁 통조림을 먹고, 아니 마시고 있는 브라우니의 모습이 보인다.

1000605195.english: ...In my humble opinion, she appears to be a rookie who couldn't even make it on time for sortie. Just by looking at her... she is utterly inept.
1000605195.korean: ...소첩의 짧은 생각으로는 출격 시간조차 맞추지 못한 신병인 것 같사옵니다. 척보기에도... 어설프기 짝이 없사옵니다.

1000605196.english: - To think the combatants were making do with their meals like that. Not even during an operation, but inside the Orca...
1000605196.korean: - 전투원들이 저런 식으로 끼니를 때우고 있었다니. 작전 중도 아니고 오르카 안에서...

1000605197.english: Master, you must increase your exercise as much as your food intake. If you're not careful, you'll end up looking like a chubby pig...
1000605197.korean: 주인님, 늘어난 식사량만큼 운동량도 늘리셔야 합니다. 자칫하다가는 보기 좋게 살찐 돼...

1000605199.english: - Quick-witted Vanilla caught the poor brownie inside the monitor.
1000605199.korean: - 눈치 빠른 바닐라는 모니터 속의 가엾은 브라우니를 잡아냈다.

1000605200.english: I never knew such a pure heart remained within your narrow-minded heart, Master.
1000605200.korean: 주인님의 좁은 속내에 그런 순수한 마음이 남아 있을 줄은 몰랐습니다.

1000605201.english: - For a moment, the maids' movements stopped.

1000605202.english: ... I fully understand what you mean. But Master, the combatants fighting in the field...
1000605202.korean: ... 무슨 뜻인지는 잘 알겠습니다. 하지만 주인님, 야전을 치르는 전투원들은...

1000605204.english: - What did I just say? Commander's call?
1000605204.korean: - 방금 내가 무슨 소리를 했지? 지휘관 소집?

1000605206.english: Yes. Yes, that is correct. All commanders are to be assembled. It is the Commander's order. All. Will. Assemble.
1000605206.korean: 네. 네, 맞아요. 지휘관 전원 소집입니다. 사령관님의 명령입니다.&n전.원.소.집.

1000605209.english: - It is suffocating when 'they' gather in one place.

1000605211.english: I wish you would just convey the essentials.

1000605212.english: Didn't you call us because you had something to say? Go ahead and say it.
1000605212.korean: 하고 싶은 말이 있어서 우릴 부른 것 아니었어? 어서 말해봐.

1000605213.english: But that's strange. I don't see Captain May. What happened?
1000605213.korean: 그런데 이상하군. '메이' 대장이 보이지 않는데. 어떻게 된 일이지?

1000605214.english: ... I have a message sent by 'May'... Shall I pass it on?
1000605214.korean: ... '메이'가 보낸 메시지가 있는데... 내가 전달해 줄까?

1000605215.english: "Who gave you the right to order me around? You stupid commander!"...or so they say?
1000605215.korean: 누구 맘대로 오라가라는 거야? 멍청이 사령관!'&n...이라는데?

1000605217.english: - ...Haha... It's a relief that one person is gone... It's really a relief...
1000605217.korean: - ...하하... 한 명이 줄어서 다행이다… 정말로 다행이야…

1000605219.english: Thanks. We're not used to one-sided summons either. Could you keep this short?
1000605219.korean: 고맙군. 이쪽도 일방적인 소집에는 익숙하지 않아. 짧게 끝내줄 수 있겠나?

1000605220.english: Commander... I thought you would have worked harder and become a decent man. It's a bit disappointing if things continue like this...
1000605220.korean: 사령관... 난 사령관이 좀 더 정진해서 괜찮은 남자가 되어 있을 줄 알았어. &n이런 식이면 좀 실망스러운데...

1000605222.english: Your Excellency, Commander. I have received a brief report from Constancia. I have heard that Your Excellency is concerned about the soldiers' food situation.
1000605222.korean: 사령관 각하. 콘스탄차에게 간략한 내용은 전달받았습니다.&n각하께선 병사들의 급양 상태를 우려하고 계신다고 들었습니다.

1000605223.english: ...That's a lame joke. Even the Commander should know that much...
1000605223.korean: ...재미없는 농담이군. 사령관도 그 정도는 알고 있을텐…

1000605224.english: - I explained that the supply facilities for the combatants were woefully insufficient and ordered the securing of facilities.
1000605224.korean: - 나는 전투원들에게 보급할 급양 설비가 턱없이 부족함을 설명하고, 설비&n확보를 명령했다.

1000605225.english: - A suffocating silence descended upon the bridge. What could the commanders be thinking right now...
1000605225.korean: - 숨막히는 침묵이 함교에 내려앉았다. 지휘관들은 지금 무슨 생각을 하고 있는걸까...

1000605226.english: Yes, Your Excellency. I will secure the area as ordered.

1000605227.english: Hmm, we are merely following orders. Let's lead the Horde and sortie immediately.
1000605227.korean: 흠, 우리는 명령을 따를 뿐이다. 호드를 이끌고 바로 출격하도록 하지.

1000605228.english: Hmm... Are you sure the calculation is finished?
1000605228.korean: 흠... 계산은 다 끝난 거 맞아?

1000605229.english: ...No, nothing. Then... I guess I should go keep the Commander in a good mood.
1000605229.korean: ...아니야, 아무것도. 그럼... 사령관 기분이나 맞춰주러 가야겠네.

1000605230.english: Your Excellency, please issue the sortie order.

1000605232.english: - No, let's stop the useless thoughts. Command comes first right now.
1000605232.korean: - 아니, 쓸데없는 생각은 그만두자. 지금은 지휘가 우선이다.

1000605233.english: - To start with the conclusion, my plan failed.

1000605234.english: - Although the area was secured, the scale of the secured facilities was woefully insufficient to raise the food supply status of the entire army.
1000605234.korean: - 구역 확보는 성공했지만, 확보한 시설의 규모로는 전 군의 급양 상태를&n끌어올리기에 턱없이 부족했다.

1000605235.english: If this incident served as an opportunity for the Commander to learn something, that is enough. I will head back now.
1000605235.korean: 이번 일로 사령관이 뭔가 배울 수 있는 계기가 되었다면, 그걸로 충분하다.&n난 이만 돌아가지.

1000605236.english: Don't turn bright red like that; think about how you can do better next time.
1000605236.korean: 그렇게 얼굴 새빨갛게 물들이고 있지 말고, 다음엔 어떻게 더 잘해볼지나 생각해 봐.

1000605237.english: Because I will believe in you.

1000605240.english: - Marie exited with a composed demeanor so as not to make me uncomfortable.
1000605240.korean: - 마리는 내가 불편하지 않도록 절도 있는 자세로 퇴장했다.

1000605241.english: - The result of pushing the combatants forward based solely on emotion without any plan was disastrous.
1000605241.korean: - 계획도 짜지 않고 감정만 앞세워 전투원들을 밀어붙인 결과는 처참했다.

1000605242.english: - The scale of the facility was much smaller than I had expected. It was barely capable of producing snacks, let alone meals for the combatants...
1000605242.korean: - 설비의 규모는 내가 예상했던 것보다 훨씬 작았다. 전투원들의 끼니는커녕&n간식 정도만 겨우 만들어 낼 수 있는 수준으로...

1000605243.english: - Feeling embarrassed, I blurted out a word to myself.

1000605244.english: It is just as Master said.

1000605245.english: I have also inspected the facilities. As for snacks... I think it will be quite possible.
1000605245.korean: 소첩도 설비를 둘러보고 왔사옵니다. 간식 정도라면... 충분히 가능할 것 같사옵니다.

1000605246.english: can do it too! Master, I'll help you!
1000605246.korean: 저도 할 수 있어요! 주인님, 제가 도와드릴게요!

1000605247.english: If we deploy all of Orca's maids, we will be able to distribute at least a 'special meal' to the combatants.
1000605247.korean: 오르카의 모든 메이드들을 투입한다면, 전투원들에게 '특식' 정도는 배급할 수 있을겁니다.

1000605248.english: Yes, Your Majesty. Please leave it to me.

1000605250.english: It will be as Master wishes.

1000605251.english: Miss Hachiko, Vanilla. I need the help of a Battle Maid and a Companion.
1000605251.korean: 하치코 양, 바닐라. 배틀 메이드와 컴패니언의 도움이 필요하옵니다.

1000605252.english: Hmph. To think you're wagging your tail at your master... I suppose that means you don't even need to hide it anymore, right?
1000605252.korean: 흥. 주인님께 꼬리나 치다니... 이젠 숨길 필요도 없다는 뜻이겠죠?

1000605253.english: Hachiko is about to depart! Please wait just a moment!

1000605254.english: - The maids said their goodbyes and left the bridge.

1000605256.english: - How much time had passed? All the maids on board were barely able to meet the quantity of 'Orca Lunch Boxes' needed for supplies.
1000605256.korean: - 얼마나 지났을까.&n함내의 모든 메이드들은 보급에 필요한 '오르카 도시락'의 수량을 겨우 맞출 수 있었다.

1000605257.english: - Although the 'Orca Lunch Box' was nothing more than a slice of Hachiko's pie in each, fortunately, I was able to hear the pleasant news that the morale of the combatants had risen.
1000605257.korean: - '오르카 도시락' 이라고 해 봐야 하치코의 파이가 한 조각씩 들어있는 것이지만, &n다행히도 전투원들의 사기가 올랐다는 기분좋은 소식을 전해들을 수 있었다.

1000605261.english: ... Please forgive my rudeness. I couldn't leave 'Hachiko's Pie Factory'... Well then, goodbye...
1000605261.korean: ... 무례를 용서하세요. '하치코의 파이 공장' 에서 자리를 비울 수가없어서...&n그럼 이만...

1000605262.english: - On my table, there is a can of tuna that Perrault hurriedly brought.
1000605262.korean: - 내 테이블 위에는 페로가 급히 가져다 준 참치 캔이 하나.

1000605263.english: - Still... by now, everyone must be sharing some delicious food, right?
1000605263.korean: - 그래도… 지금쯤이면 모두 맛있는 음식을 나눠먹고 있겠지?

1000605264.english: - With a pleased heart, I opened the tuna can and looked up, only to make eye contact with Brownie, who was in charge of security.
1000605264.korean: - 흐뭇한 마음에 참치캔을 열고 고개를 든 순간, 경호를 맡은 브라우니와 눈이&n마주쳤다.

1000605265.english: Wow! I look forward to working with you, Commander! You’ve gone through a lot of trouble because of me.
1000605265.korean: 이야! 잘 부탁드림다, 사령관님! 저 때문에 고생 많으셨지 말임다.

1000605266.english: - On Brownie's table, warm Hachiko pie and drinks are prepared.
1000605266.korean: - 브라우니의 테이블 위에는, 따끈한 하치코 파이와 음료가 준비되어 있다.

1000605267.english: - Brownie smiled awkwardly as she looked back and forth between my tuna and her pie.
1000605267.korean: - 브라우니는 내 참치와 자신의 파이를 번갈아 보며 어색하게 웃었다.

1000605268.english: Um... would you... like to eat together?

1000605269.english: - Brownie, who had been glancing around cautiously only after I took a bite of the tuna, took a big bite of the pie with a happy face.
1000605269.korean: - 내가 참치를 한 입 먹고나서야 눈치를 보던 브라우니가 행복한 얼굴로 파이를 크게 베어 물었다.

1000605270.english: - The Hachiko Pie kept flickering before my eyes, so I just kept fumbling around with the innocent tuna for a long time.
1000605270.korean: - 나는 하치코 파이가 자꾸만 눈 앞에 어른거려서 애꿎은 참치만 한참 뒤적거렸다.

1000605271.english: - I live receiving a lot of help.

1000605272.english: - Even at this very moment... I am receiving help.
1000605272.korean: - 지금 이 순간도... 도움을 받고 있지.

1000605273.english: Hey, Commander. What are you doing?

1000605275.english: What you're writing right now... what is that? Don't tell me, a diary?
1000605275.korean: 지금 쓰고 있는거... 그거 뭐야? 설마, 일기?

1000605276.english: - I have an obligation to repay all of this.
1000605276.korean: - 나에겐 이 모든 것에 보답해야할 의무가 있다.

1000605277.english: - Even if the path ahead is one I cannot handle...
1000605277.korean: - 설령 그 앞길이 내가 감당할 수 없는 길일지라도...

1000605278.english: Ahhh! I'm dying of embarrassment! What are you doing! Can I take a picture?
1000605278.korean: 아아~! 부끄러 죽겠네! 지금 뭐하는 거야! 사진 찍어도 돼?

1000605279.english: - Now is the time to show the side of a commander who cooks, not just one who issues combat orders.
1000605279.korean: - 이젠 전투 명령만 내리는 사령관이 아닌, 요리하는 사령관의 모습을&n보여줄 때다.

1000605280.english: - It is time to treat them to the best meal using the finest ingredients.
1000605280.korean: - 최고의 식재료를 이용해서, 그녀들에게 최고의 식사를 대접할 시간이 왔다.

1000605281.english: - Let's go! To find the best ingredients!

1000605282.english: Ah! I knew this would happen! You stupid commander!
1000605282.korean: 아아! 내가 이럴 줄 알았어! 바보 사령관!

1000605283.english: - When the cooking was all finished, I couldn't lift a finger, so I lay sprawled on the floor and caught my breath.
1000605283.korean: - 요리가 전부 끝나고, 나는 손가락 하나 까딱할 수 없어 바닥에 드러누운 채 숨을 골랐다.

1000605284.english: - As the combatants returned to their positions, the bustling Orca became quiet again.
1000605284.korean: - 전투원들이 제자리를 찾아가자 시끌벅적했던 오르카는 다시 조용해졌다.

1000605285.english: You did a great job, Master! You look the coolest today out of all the times!
1000605285.korean: 수고하셨어요, 주인님! 지금까지중에 오늘의 주인님이 제일 멋있어요!

1000605286.english: Then... can Hachiko lie down with us too?

1000605289.english: - Hachiko and Perrault lay down right next to me. A moment later, I could hear even breathing from both sides.
1000605289.korean: - 하치코와 페로는 내 옆에 딱 붙어 누웠다. 잠시 후 양 옆에서 고른 숨소리가 들려왔다.

1000605290.english: - Sowan, do you have something to say?

1000605294.english: - What is Sowan thinking these days?
1000605294.korean: - 소완은 요즘 무슨 생각을 하고 있는 걸까?

1000605295.english: Oh, Commander! You worked really hard today.
1000605295.korean: 오, 사령관! 오늘 정말 고생 많았어.

1000605296.english: I almost died too, you know. You shove us into a place like that just to get ingredients? Do you want to get in trouble?
1000605296.korean: 나도 죽을뻔 했지만 말이야. 겨우 식재료 구하겠다고 우릴 그런 곳에 밀어 넣어?&n혼날래?

1000605297.english: Heh, just kidding. Anyway, thanks to you, I had a good meal. I'm super full~
1000605297.korean: 킥, 농담이야.&n아무튼, 덕분에 잘 먹었어. 엄청 배부르다~

1000605298.english: Why... why do you keep asking things like that... when you already know...
1000605298.korean: 뭘... 그런 걸 자꾸 물어보고 그래... 다 알면서...

1000605300.english: It wasn't very good. Maybe the Commander has no talent for cooking?
1000605300.korean: 별로였어. 사령관은 요리엔 재능이 없는 게 아닐까?

1000605301.english: - Well, Orca's day always goes by like this.
1000605301.korean: - 뭐, 오르카의 하루는 늘 이렇게 흘러간다.

1000605302.english: - Anyway... the sensation of the hands slicing the ingredients, the sound of them cooking...
1000605302.korean: - 그건 그렇고... 재료를 써는 손의 감각, 재료가 익어가는 소리...

1000605303.english: - I don't think I'll be able to get the thought of cooking out of my head for a while.
1000605303.korean: - 당분간 머릿속에서 요리 생각이 떠나질 않을 것 같다.

1000605304.english: Ahhh! Don't do that. I'd rather just eat chocolate than eat what the Commander made.
1000605304.korean: 아아~! 그런 거 하지 마. 사령관이 해준 걸 먹을 바엔 난 그냥 초콜릿이나 먹을래.

1000605305.english: Or… I can make it for you. How about it? Do you want to eat?
1000605305.korean: 아니면… 내가 해줘도 되고. 어때? 먹고 싶어?

1000605306.english: Oh, Commander, Sister Fortune came here to tell you something~? &n The Rampart baby has been acting a little strange lately, so I'm really worried about Sister...
1000605306.korean: 아, 사령관 님, 포츈 누나가 할 말이 있어서 왔거든~?&n요즘 램파트 애기가 조금 이상해서, 누나 너무 걱정돼...

1000605307.english: My sister found Rampart's past battle memories and updated them in case they could be helpful in battle.
1000605307.korean: 누나가 혹시 전투에 도움이 될까봐 램파트 과거 전투 메모리를 찾아서 &n업데이트 했거든?

1000605308.english: But since then, Rampart has strangely lost his motivation? It seems like him fighting prowess has also dropped slightly...
1000605308.korean: 그런데 그 이후로 이상하게 램파트가 의욕이 없거든?&n전투력도 미묘하게 떨어진 것 같고 말야...

1000605309.english: An AI like Rampart, while not quite as emotional, does have some similarities to a Bioroid, right? &n If you say that, Commander, the robot babies will be upset...
1000605309.korean: 램파트 정도 되는 AI는 감정까진 아니더라도 바이오로이드랑 비슷한 부분도 있거든?&n사령관 님이 그렇게 말하면 로봇 애기들이 섭섭해 해...

1000605310.english: Anyway, when I ask, he doesn't answer and just says there's no problem? I think it would be better for the Commander to ask.
1000605310.korean: 어쨌든 내가 물어봐도 대답은 안하고 문제 없다고만 하거든?&n아무래도 사령관 님이 좀 물어보는 게 좋을 것 같아.

1000605311.english: How about it, Commander? Are you going to help our Rampart?
1000605311.korean: 어때? 사령관 님? 우리 램파트 도와주러 갈 거지?

1000605312.english: Oh, Your Majesty, Commander. It's a pleasure to meet you. What brings you here?
1000605312.korean: 아, 사령관 각하. 이렇게 만나뵙게 되어 반갑습니다.&n무슨 일이시죠?

1000605313.english: Haha. Miss Fortune, you're making a ridiculous misunderstanding. I'm the pride of Omega Industries. A mere battle memory update wouldn't have dampened my spirits.
1000605313.korean: 하하. 포츈 양도 터무니 없는 오해를 하시는 군요. 전 오메가 산업의 자존심입니다.&n고작 전투 메모리 업데이트로 의욕이 떨어질 리 없지요.

1000605314.english: Well, I guess you're mistaken, Ms. Fortune, since you're mainly looking at Clover Industries' low-cost models. Don't worry, I'm fine.
1000605314.korean: 뭐, 아무래도 포츈 양은 클로버 산업의 저가형 모델을 주로 보시니 &n착각을 하신 것 같습니다. 저는 아무런 문제도 없으니 걱정 마십시오.

1000605315.english: Besides, there is something I wanted to report to Your Excellency the Commander.
1000605315.korean: 그보다 그러지 않아도 사령관 각하께 보고를 드리려고 했던 사항이 있습니다.

1000605316.english: A few days ago, I discovered a small colony of iron beetles on the street west of the police station where I was conducting reconnaissance. Upon closer inspection, it seemed to be a forward base for adults, but no larvae.
1000605316.korean: 며칠 전에 정찰을 갔던 서쪽 경찰서 거리에서 작은 철충 군집을 발견했습니다.&n자세히 보니 유충은 없는 성체들의 전진 기지 같더군요.

1000605317.english: Since there are no larvae, it seems like AGS and City Guard robots will be able to do their job... What do you think?
1000605317.korean: 유충이 없으니 AGS와 시티가드의 로봇들도 활약할 수 있을 것 같은데...&n어떠십니까?

1000605318.english: If you send me out, I will completely destroy the enemy and come back. I will take care of the rest.
1000605318.korean: 출동을 시켜 주시면 완벽하게 적을 격멸하고 오지요.&n나머지는 제가 알아서 하겠습니다.

1000605319.english: Hmm... That's the end. It's so trivial...

1000605321.english: Huh? I don't know what you're talking about, Puppy. &n I'm worried your language module isn't working properly.
1000605321.korean: 응? 무슨 말을 하는지 모르겠군. 퍼피.&n자네의 언어 모듈이 제대로 작동하고 있는지 걱정이야.

1000605322.english: You may not know this, but the Pupp Head stores its history memory by default when it is manufactured.
1000605322.korean: 자네가 알 지는 모르지만 펍 헤드는 제조 때 히스토리 메모리를 기본으로 &n저장한다네.

1000605323.english: If I remember correctly... this police station is where "that incident" happened... and I also heard that Mr. Fortune updated your combat memory...
1000605323.korean: 내 기억이 맞다면... 이 경찰서는 '그 사건'이 일어났던 곳이 아닌가 싶어서...&n게다가 포츈 선생님이 자네의 전투 메모리를 업데이트 해줬다는 이야기도 들었고...

1000605324.english: ... &n It is truly vain to ask a lady for secrets.

1000605325.english: I see... Is that so? How strange. We're robots. Why do we need revenge...
1000605325.korean: 역시... 그건가? 이상하군. 우린 로봇일세.&n어째서 복수 따위를...

1000605326.english: Revenge? I never thought about that. But...
1000605326.korean: 복수라니? 그런 걸 생각한 적은 없네.&n다만...

1000605327.english: ...Police robots like you and me have some limitations in their minds. Like sympathy modules... or empathy modules...
1000605327.korean: ... 나나 자네같은 경찰 로봇들은 마음 속에 몇 가지 리미터가 있지.&n동정심 모듈이나... 공감 모듈 같은...

1000605328.english: Isn't it natural that our purpose is to protect, not to kill?
1000605328.korean: 우린 죽이는 게 목적이 아니라 지키는 게 목적이니 당연한 게 아닌가?

1000605329.english: When I learned of the past and indirectly experienced those memories, I wondered if a robot that had lost everything it could protect would need such a module.
1000605329.korean: 과거의 일을 알고 간접적으로 그 기억을 경험했을 때&n의문이 들더군. 지킬 것을 모두 잃은 로봇에게도 그런 모듈이 필요할지.

1000605331.english: Right. I have a desire to remove that compassion and empathy from my AI.
1000605331.korean: 그래. 난 내 AI에서 그 동정심과 공감을 제거하고 싶은 마음이 있다네.

1000605332.english: That is a foolish thought. I can't believe you are from the same Omega Industries as me. Even for a robot, the removal of emotions can't possibly be positive.
1000605332.korean: 어리석은 생각일세. 도저히 자네가 나와 같은 오메가 공업 출신으론 생각되지 않는군.&n아무리 로봇이라도 감정의 제거가 긍정적일 리 없지 않나.

1000605333.english: ... Well... even I find it hard to say for sure. Don't worry too much. Today, I really just came to eliminate the Iron Bug swarm.
1000605333.korean: ... 글쎄... 그건 나도 섣불리 말하기 힘들군.&n너무 걱정 말게. 오늘은 그저 정말로 철충 군집을 없애러 왔으니.

1000605334.english: It is just a cluster that caught my eye by chance...

1000605335.english: So... you're saying Puppy is saying that the Rampart baby is having a hard time because of the combat update?
1000605335.korean: 그러니까... 퍼피 말은 램파트 애기가 전투 업데이트 때문에 괴로워 하고 있단 &n말이지?

1000605336.english: That is exactly right, Mr. Fortune. Is there no way?
1000605336.korean: 바로 그렇다네. 포츈 선생. 어떻게 방법이 없을까?

1000605337.english: Well? Hmm... I'm not sure which part of the combat update might have bothered Rampart... I haven't seen all the data myself, so...
1000605337.korean: 글쎄? 흠... 전투 업데이트의 어느 부분이 램파트 애기를 괴롭혔을 지...&n나도 데이터를 모두 본 게 아니라서...

1000605338.english: For now, judging by the fact that they went to that police station... it seems likely it is because of the steel mill hostage massacre.
1000605338.korean: 일단, 그 경찰서로 갔었던 것으로 보아...&n아무래도 제철소 인질 학살 사건 때문인 것 같네.

1000605340.english: ... This happened at the coastal steelworks nearby. Even during the war with the Iron Bugs, anti-company forces were attacking the company.
1000605340.korean: ... 이 근처에 있는 해안 제철소에서 일어났던 일일세.&n철충과 전쟁 기간 동안에도 반회사 세력은 회사를 공격하고 있었지.

1000605341.english: At that time, the Ramparts were dispatched upon hearing that hostages had been taken at the steel mill. Their objective was to rescue the hostages held by anti-company terrorists and subdue the terrorists.
1000605341.korean: 그때, 제철소에서 인질이 잡혔다는 이야기를 듣고 램파트들이 출동 했었다네.&n목표는 반회사 테러리스트들이 잡은 인질을 구출하고 테러리스트들을 제압하는 것.

1000605342.english: However, the terrorists were no pushovers. They left a fatal wound on the child hostage and fled.
1000605342.korean: 하지만, 테러리스트들도 만만치 않았지. &n인질이었던 아이에게 치명적인 상처를 남기고 도주해 버린 거야.

1000605343.english: Up until this point, it was just a failure of the operation... but bad things happened one after another.
1000605343.korean: 여기까지는 그저 작전의 실패였지만...&n나쁜 일은 중첩되어 일어났네.

1000605344.english: While trying to rescue that hostage, the police station near the steelworks... and Rampart's main base were invaded by Iron Bugs.
1000605344.korean: 그 인질을 구하려고 노력하는 사이에 제철소 인근 경찰서...&n램파트의 본 기지에 철충들이 쳐들어 왔다네.

1000605345.english: Rampart was already torn between the hostage child, who had no chance of survival, and his colleague. And, following the instructions of his ethics module, he took the hostage to the hospital despite the low probability.
1000605345.korean: 램파트는 이미 살아날 가망이 없는 인질 아이와 동료 사이에서 고민을 했었다네. &n그리고, 자신의 윤리 모듈이 시키는대로 확률이 낮지만 인질을 데리고 병원으로 갔지.

1000605346.english: Oh my god... So what happened? Huh?
1000605346.korean: 세상에... 그래서 어떻게 된 거야? 응?

1000605347.english: The probability of a hostage surviving is 4%. Naturally, such a probability rarely materializes. It is an incident where the hostage died and all the colleagues at the police station were massacred.
1000605347.korean: 인질이 살 확률은 4%. 당연히 그런 확률은 실현되는 경우가 별로 없지.&n인질은 사망했고 경찰서에 있던 동료들도 모두 학살당한 사건일세.

1000605348.english: This happened right at the police station we visited a while ago.
1000605348.korean: 바로 우리가 얼마 전 다녀온 경찰서에서 있었던 일이지.

1000605350.english: So, the main building says it can understand why Rampart is trying to remove the ethics module... I mean, the empathy module and the compassion module. Of course, it is the opposite, though...
1000605350.korean: 그래서 본관은 램파트가 윤리 모듈... 그러니까 공감 모듈과 동정심 모듈을&n빼려고 하는 걸 이해할 수 있다네. 물론 반대긴 하지만...

1000605351.english: Phew... Now that I've said all this, Mr. Rampart will surely resent me. That is all for my story.
1000605351.korean: 휴... 이걸 다 말해 버렸으니 램파트 군이 날 원망하겠군.&n내 이야기는 여기까지일세.

1000605352.english: ... I see... If that is the situation... as family, we should help. Commander... Sister made a promise, you know? To help the little Rampart... Commander? Don't you have any thoughts?
1000605352.korean: ... 그렇구나... 그런 사정이 있다면... 가족인 우리가 도와야지. 사령관 님... &n누나 다짐했거든? 램파트 애기를 돕기로... 사령관 님? 무슨 생각 없어?

1000605353.english: Yeah. I'll be thinking about it, too. Make sure to let me know if you come up with a good idea!
1000605353.korean: 응. 누나도 생각을 하고 있을게.좋은 생각 나면 꼭 말해줘야 해!

1000605354.english: Oh dear... To think that the story reached His Excellency the Commander... I am simply apologetic.
1000605354.korean: 참... 사령관 각하께까지 그 이야기가 전해졌다니...&n그저 송구스럽군요.

1000605355.english: Yes. That is correct, Your Excellency. I am currently looking for a way to remove that module without causing any issues with other functions.
1000605355.korean: 네. 맞습니다. 각하. 전 현재 그 모듈을 다른 기능에 문제가 없이 &n제거할 방법을 찾고 있습니다.

1000605356.english: However... since there could be functional issues with the program... we are looking for a way to avoid becoming incapacitated in combat.
1000605356.korean: 다만... 프로그램 적으로 기능적인 문제가 생길 수 있어서...&n전투 불능이 되지 않기 위해 방법을 찾고 있죠.

1000605357.english: Well, I know you want a dramatic entrance, but... me taking a 5-minute break is like wasting 5 minutes of humanity.
1000605357.korean: 뭐, 드라마틱한 등장을 원하는 건 알겠지만...&n제가 5분을 쉬는 건 인류의 5분을 낭비하는 것과 같아요.

1000605358.english: Anyway, I roughly heard the story. You're saying you want me to lower the sensitivity of that overly emotional robot, right?
1000605358.korean: 어쨌든 이야긴 대충 들었어요.&n저 감정 과잉 로봇의 감수성을 낮춰달란 이야기죠?

1000605359.english: Could you remove it if possible?

1000605360.english: It's completely impossible. You didn't really think the program code would be that simple, did you?
1000605360.korean: 완전히는 불가능해요.&n프로그램 코드가 설마 그렇게 단순할 거라곤 생각 안했겠죠?

1000605361.english: If you remove one, it doesn't just remove that one; you have to overhaul all the code connected to that module.
1000605361.korean: 하나를 없애면 그것만 없어지는 게 아니라 그 모듈과 연결된 모든 코드를&n손을 봐줘야 하는 거예요.

1000605362.english: Well... there is a way in this case. But, Omega industrial robots are a bit of a hassle...
1000605362.korean: 뭐... 이 경우는 방법이 있긴 있어요.&n하지만, 오메가 공업 로봇들은 좀 귀찮은데...

1000605363.english: How... are you disrespecting Omega Industries' robots?
1000605363.korean: 그게 무슨... 오메가 공업의 로봇들을 무시하는 것이오?

1000605366.english: Omega Robots has pretty strong locks. It’s hard to bypass the firewall. So they don’t really bother trying to break in. It’s better to just get a protector key.
1000605366.korean: 오메가 로봇은 락이 좀 쎄거든. 방화벽 뚫는게 어렵단 말이야.&n그래서 굳이 뚫으려고 하지도 않고. 그냥 프로텍터 키 하나를 구하는 게 낫지.

1000605368.english: If you go to the nearby Omega Industrial Factory, you should be fine just getting a Protector Key. Oh, and of course, make sure to get rid of the Iron Bug first.
1000605368.korean: 근처 오메가 공업 공장에 가면 프로텍터 키 하나 구하면 될 거야.&n아, 물론 철충부터 없애 두고.

1000605369.english: I'll take care of the rest. Commander? That would be alright, wouldn't it?
1000605369.korean: 나머지는 내가 준비를 해둘게. 사령관 님? 그렇게 해도 되겠죠?

1000605370.english: Hmm... I found the protect key.

1000605371.english: With this, the 'emotional excess module' will be removed from me. Thank you in advance, Miss Scathy.
1000605371.korean: 이걸로 제게서 '감정 과잉 모듈'이 제거되겠군요.&n미리 감사드립니다. 스카디 양.

1000605372.english: Well, it’s not really something to be thankful for. And instead of removing the emotion overload module... I’m going to use a different method.
1000605372.korean: 뭐 그렇게 감사를 받을 일은 아니야. &n그리고 감정 과잉 모듈을 제거 하는게 아니라... 다른 방법을 사용할 거야.

1000605373.english: Here is a method to overlay your emotions using the military AI ethics module.
1000605373.korean: 여기 군용 AI 윤리 모듈 부분으로 네 감정 부분을 덮어 씌우는 방법이지.

1000605374.english: Emotions won't disappear completely. You'll just turn into a military robot. So... listen carefully.
1000605374.korean: 아예 감정이 사라지진 않아. 군용 로봇처럼 변하겠지만.&n그러니... 잘 들어둬.

1000605375.english: Maybe... your sisters used to think you were a pretty decent robot. Because for a robot, you had emotions and were really... like a bioroid.
1000605375.korean: 아마... 이전엔 자매들이 널 꽤 괜찮은 로봇이라고 생각했을 거야.&n로봇 치곤 감정도 있고 진짜... 바이오로이드 같았으니까.

1000605376.english: You might be happy or sad... but now that will fade away.
1000605376.korean: 넌 기뻐하기도 하고 슬퍼할 수도 있겠지만...&n이젠 그게 희미해 질 거야.

1000605377.english: Your sense of duty to kill enemies will become strongest... and you will become closer to a machine. If that is okay with you... I will upload military AI to you.
1000605377.korean: 넌 적을 죽이려는 의무감이 가장 강해질 거고...&n좀 더 기계에 가까워 질 거야. 그래도 좋다면...군용 AI를 네게 업로드 해줄게.

1000605379.english: ... If my feelings could harm other colleagues... I don't intend to regret it even if I were to disappear.
1000605379.korean: ... 제 감정이 다른 동료를 해칠 수 있다면...&n없어진다고 해도 후회하진 않을 생각입니다.

1000605380.english: Okay. If that's what you think, I suppose I should respect it. Then... let's start the upload.
1000605380.korean: 좋아. 네 생각이 그렇다면 존중해야겠지.&n그럼... 업로드를 시작해 보자.

1000605381.english: Ah! Commander? Baby Rampart and I came to say hello because the program was updated!
1000605381.korean: 아! 사령관 님? 나랑 램파트 애기랑 이번에 프로그램 업데이트가 되어서&n인사를 하러 왔어요!

1000605382.english: It is a pleasure to meet you, Your Excellency the Commander!

1000605383.english: They even gave me a military-style paint job as a gift this time, you know? Oh my... Noona feels a little teary-eyed because it seems like the baby has grown up so much.
1000605383.korean: 이번에 기념으로 군용 도장도 서비스해 줬거든?&n아유... 누나 어쩐지 애기가 다 큰 것 같아서 약간 눈물 나.

1000605384.english: Is this what it feels like when the child you had with the Commander grows up? You're tearing up too, Commander, aren't you?
1000605384.korean: 사령관 님과 낳은 아이가 어른이 된 기분이 이런 걸까?&n사령관 님도 눈물이 나지?

1000605385.english: Do not be sad, Miss Fortune. And Your Excellency the Commander, thank you very much for allowing my modification.
1000605385.korean: 슬퍼하지 마십시오. 포츈 양. &n그리고 사령관 각하, 제 개조를 허락해 주셔서 정말 감사합니다.

1000605386.english: Now, all that remains is to annihilate the Iron Bug with an unwavering heart.
1000605386.korean: 이제 흔들림 없는 마음으로 철충을 말살하는 일 만이 남았군요.

1000605387.english: From now on... I will focus my efforts on exterminating the Iron Bug more quickly and efficiently.
1000605387.korean: 앞으로는... 좀 더 빠르고 효율적인 철충 말살에 힘을 쓰도록 하겠습니다.

1000605389.english: Um, Master. Are you busy by any chance? I came to ask you something...
1000605389.korean: 저, 주인님. 혹시 바쁘신가요? 여쭤볼 게 있어서 왔는데...

1000605390.english: It's not anything else... um... that is...

1000605391.english: Phew... I knew this would happen. Haven't you asked yet?
1000605391.korean: 휴... 내가 이럴 줄 알았어요. 아직도 못 물어봤나요?

1000605392.english: Ah... no... Amy... I was just about to ask you...
1000605392.korean: 아... 아니에요... 에이미... 이제 여쭤보려고 했어요...

1000605393.english: Yes, yes... I suppose so. I'll ask them for you instead. Honey, I have a question. By any chance, do you like glasses?
1000605393.korean: 네네... 그러시겠죠. 차라리 제가 물어봐 드릴게요.&n자기, 궁금한 게 있는데 혹시 자기는 안경을 좋아하나요?

1000605394.english: Human men have preferences, you know. I understand that glasses fall into that category... Miss Constantia here seems to be worrying too much.
1000605394.korean: 인간 남자들은 취향이 있잖아요. 그 범위에 안경도 들어가는 걸로 아는데...&n여기 콘스탄챠 양이 걱정이 너무 많네요.

1000605395.english: When, when did I ever worry?

1000605396.english: Oh my, getting angry when you don't usually do that means you're admitting the truth, right? Hehe. You'll have to answer me right away. How about the young lady with glasses?
1000605396.korean: 어머나, 안 내던 화를 내는 건 사실을 인정한단 뜻이겠죠?&n후후. 자기가 얼른 대답을 해주셔야겠어요. 안경을 쓴 아가씨는 어떤가요?

1000605398.english: Oh my, that expression is nice. I want to tease you... But still, it's a relief. Actually, those aren't glasses, they're smart glasses.
1000605398.korean: 어머나, 그 표정 좋네요. 괴롭혀 주고 싶어...&n그래도 다행이에요. 사실 저건 안경이 아니라 스마트 글래스거든요.

1000605399.english: Originally, this girl isn't a combat model, so she doesn't have a neural display module and has to wear smart glasses. It wouldn't make sense to leave it out.
1000605399.korean: 원래 이 아가씨는 전투 모델이 아니라 신경 디스플레이 모듈이 없어&n스마트 글래스를 써야 하거든요. 빼긴 그렇죠.

1000605400.english: It's a relief that she likes glasses. Really... if she had hated them, our Miss Constantia would have almost cried.
1000605400.korean: 자기가 안경을 좋아해서 다행이요. &n정말... 자기가 싫어했으면 우리 콘스탄챠 양이 울 뻔 했네요.

1000605402.english: Oh my, isn't that a really disappointing thing to say? Surely... you aren't going to say you dislike Miss Constantia because of her glasses, are you?
1000605402.korean: 어머나, 자기 그거 너무 실망스러운 말 아닌가요?&n설마... 안경 때문에 콘스탄챠 양을 싫다고 말할 건 아니겠죠?

1000605403.english: Really? Hmm... Honey, you didn't lie just because you were in a difficult situation, did you? Honey, those aren't glasses, they're smart glasses. You wear them instead of a combat display module...
1000605403.korean: 그래요? 흠....자기, 괜히 난처하니까 거짓말 한 건 아니죠?&n자기, 저건 안경이 아니라 스마트 글래스예요. 전투 디스플레이 모듈 대신 끼는...

1000605404.english: Um... if the glasses are uncomfortable for you, Master... I'll take them off. I can fix the display module with effort... so rather than you disliking me...
1000605404.korean: 저... 혹시 주인님께서 안경이 불편하시면... &n벗을게요. 디스플레이 모듈은 노력하면 되니까... 주인님이 절 싫어하시는 것 보단...

1000605405.english: Well, anyway, we've reached a conclusion, right, Miss Constantia? Regardless of whether you wear glasses or not, our partner will never dislike you.
1000605405.korean: 자, 어쨌든 결론이 났죠? 콘스탄챠 양?&n안경 유무와 상관없이, 우리 자기가 콘스탄챠 양을 싫어하는 일은 없을 거예요.

1000605407.english: Besides, try getting hurt because your fighting power actually weakens just because you took off your glasses. It wouldn't even be funny, right? So stop talking about whether or not to take off your glasses.
1000605407.korean: 게다가 진짜로 안경 벗은 거 때문에 전투력 약해져서 다치기리도 해봐요.&n우습지도 않겠죠? 그러니까 이제 안경을 벗느니 마느니 같은 소리는 하지 말아요?

1000605409.english: Alright. Let's leave now. Honey, we're sorry for barging in so suddenly. We'll be going now. Good night!
1000605409.korean: 좋아요. 이제 물러나도록 해요.&n자기, 우리가 갑자기 들이닥쳐서 미안해요. 우린 이만 물러날게요. 잘 자요~!

1000605410.english: Phew... This is really a big deal. Honey, I have something to talk to you about regarding what happened last time...
1000605410.korean: 휴... 정말 큰 일이네요. &n자기, 저번 일 때문에 이야기할 게 있어요...

1000605411.english: Do you remember the incident with Miss Constantia's glasses? Honestly... this timid young lady is constantly worried that she might dislike glasses.
1000605411.korean: 콘스탄챠 양 안경 사건 기억하죠? 참... 이 소심한 아가씨가 혹시라도 자기가&n안경을 싫어할까봐 노심초사 하고 있어요.

1000605412.english: To think that with looks and a figure like that, you're worrying so much over just glasses... I'm so jealous.
1000605412.korean: 그 외모에 그 몸매를 가지고 있으면서도 &n겨우 안경으로 그렇게 고민하다니... 부럽기도 해라.

1000605413.english: Honey, I think I'll have to help resolve this problem myself. Still, you're not going to just leave Miss Constantia, who is one of the good squad commanders, like that, are you?
1000605413.korean: 자기, 아무래도 자기가 고민을 좀 풀어줘야겠어요.&n그래도 좋은 분대 지휘관 중에 하나인 콘스탄챠 양을 저대로 놔 둘 건 아니죠?

1000605414.english: Hehe. You remember from last time that Miss Constantia's glasses weren't just ordinary glasses, right? After all, Miss Constantia will only feel relieved if she takes them off, so I can't just take them off.
1000605414.korean: 후후. 자기 저번에 콘스탄챠 양의 안경이 그냥 안경이 아니란 건 기억하죠?&n결국, 안경을 벗어야 콘스탄챠 양도 안심을 할 테니 그냥 벗길 순 없죠.

1000605415.english: Miss Constantia's smart glasses are a window that records real-time combat information, so to replace them, a combat display module to be inserted inside the body is needed.
1000605415.korean: 콘스탄챠 양의 스마트 글라스는 실시간 전투 정보를 기록해 주는 창이니까&n그걸 대체하려면 신체 내부에 삽입할 전투 디스플레이 모듈이 필요해요.

1000605416.english: Fortunately, looking through the records, I found that the old Omega Industries produced combat modules. More information is needed to determine the exact factory location, though...
1000605416.korean: 다행히 기록을 살펴 보니 옛날 오메가 산업에서 전투 모듈을 생산했더군요.&n정확한 공장 위치를 알기 위해서는 정보가 더 필요하지만...

1000605417.english: There is an Omega Industries factory nearby. I am going to find out if that factory has ever produced combat display modules.
1000605417.korean: 이 근처에 오메가 산업의 공장이 있어요.&n전 그 공장에서 전투 디스플레이 모듈을 생산한 적이 있는지 알아볼 생각이에요.

1000605418.english: If they haven't produced it before, we can just check the factory office to see if there are any other factories. Don't worry about yourself; I'll take care of everything.
1000605418.korean: 생산한 적이 없다면 공장 사무실에서 다른 공장은 있는지 조사해 보면 되겠죠.&n자기는 걱정마요, 제가 다 알아서 할테니.

1000605419.english: There were quite a few Omega Industries factories in this industrial complex alone, so... you might be able to find one.
1000605419.korean: 이 공단에만 해도 오메가 산업의 공장이 꽤 많았으니...&n한 군데는 찾을 수 있을지 몰라요.

1000605420.english: So, my dear? Wish me luck.
1000605420.korean: 자, 그럼 우리 자기? 행운을 빌어줘요.

1000605421.english: Hmm... Unfortunately, I don't think this is the place.
1000605421.korean: 흠... 안타깝게도 여긴 아닌 것 같네요.

1000605422.english: It is not easy even for this burden... Finding Akasha's treasure... Knight Amy, have you found the oracle to proceed to next?
1000605422.korean: 이 짐에게도 쉽지 않구나...&n아카샤의 재보를 찾는 것은... 기사 에이미여, 다음으로 나아갈 신탁은 찾았나?

1000605423.english: Just wait a moment, Princess. I think there might be some information on the office computer here... let's see...
1000605423.korean: 잠시만 기다려요. 공주님. 여기 사무실 컴퓨터에 정보가 있을 것 같으니...&n보자...

1000605424.english: I, a true bloodline who has witnessed the truth of the blooming and fading universe hundreds of millions of times, could surely not fail to endure a single moment. Heh. Heh. Heh.
1000605424.korean: 피고지는 우주의 진실을 수억 번을 반복해 본 진혈인 나.&n이 찰나를 참지 못할 리 없지. 큭. 큭. 큭.

1000605425.english: ...But Amy...Can I wait while I eat the lunch box I brought earlier?
1000605425.korean: ... 근데 에이미... 나 아까 가져온 도시락 먹으면서 기다려도 돼?

1000605426.english: Haha. Okay, Princess. I'm busy, so please wait a moment, okay?
1000605426.korean: 후후. 그렇게 해요. 공주님.&n난 바쁘니까 조금만 기다려 줘요? 알겠죠?

1000605428.english: Oh my, you found the information. Factory 22... &n Huh? It's not far. It seems... close...
1000605428.korean: 어머나, 정보를 찾았군요. 22번 공장이라...&n응? 멀리 있진 않네요. 가까이 있는... 것 같은데...

1000605429.english: Oh! Are we finally getting to the truth? &n Hoo. Hoo. Hoo... It's always exciting to face a formidable enemy.
1000605429.korean: 오! 드디어 진실에 다가가는 것인가?&n후. 후. 후... 강적과의 싸움을 앞두는 건 언제나 설레는 일이지.

1000605430.english: And it is also my duty as an immortal princess to listen to the worries of Knight Constantia through that treasure...
1000605430.korean: 그리고 그 재보를 통해 기사 콘스탄챠의 고민을 들어주는 것도&n불멸자, 프린세스로써의 의무...

1000605431.english: Oh, good... Now, let's go, Princess. &n Should we report to our lover? We've been able to solve Miss Constantia's problem.
1000605431.korean: 어머, 착해라... 자, 이제 가요. 공주님.&n우리 자기한테 보고해야죠? 콘스탄챠 양의 고민을 풀 수 있게 됐다고.

1000605432.english: Excuse me... Master? I have something to tell you. Do you have a good time?
1000605432.korean: 저기... 주인님?&n드릴 말씀이 있는데 혹시 시간 괜찮으신가요?

1000605433.english: I... I heard that Amy-san is going to get a battle display module again this time... Is it because of my glasses?
1000605433.korean: 저... 이번에 또 에이미양이 전투 디스플레이 모듈을 구하러 간다고 들었는데...&n혹시... 제 안경 때문인가요?

1000605434.english: By any chance... in that case... if Master doesn't like it, just take it off... I hope you don't engage in dangerous battles. I feel sorry for my sisters too...
1000605434.korean: 혹시나... 그거라면... 주인님께서 마음이 안 드시면 그냥 벗으면 되니까...&n위험한 전투는 안 했으면 좋겠어요. 자매들에게도 미안하고...

1000605435.english: Oh my, why would such a stubborn Miss Constantia say something like that?
1000605435.korean: 어머나, 그렇게 심지가 굳은 콘스탄챠 양이 어째서 그런 말씀을 하실까?

1000605437.english: Hahaha. Miss Constantia? Don't you know what Master truly wants? As Master's closest maid... Really...
1000605437.korean: 후후후. 콘스탄챠 양? 주인님께서 진짜 원하는 게 뭔지 모르시겠나요?&n주인님의 가장 가까운 메이드면서... 정말...

1000605438.english: Is this what you really want, Master? &n I'm just doing it for your safety...
1000605438.korean: 주인님께서 진짜 원하시는 거라뇨? &n전, 그냥 주인님의 안전을 위해서...

1000605439.english: Really... Miss Constantia doesn't know how to read a man's mind. She's indirectly saying that she doesn't like Miss Constantia's glasses.
1000605439.korean: 정말... 콘스탄챠 양은 남자의 마음을 모르는군요.&n자기는 지금 콘스탄챠 양 안경이 마음에 안든다고 간접적으로 말하는 거예요.

1000605440.english: Honey, be quiet. But that doesn't mean Miss Constantia will be any more useless if she can't fight, right?
1000605440.korean: 자기, 조용. 그렇다고 해서 콘스탄챠 양이 전투를 못하면 더 쓸모 없어 지겠죠?

1000605441.english: So, you're looking for Miss Constantia's combat display module. Do you know what I mean?
1000605441.korean: 그러니 자기는 콘스탄챠 양의 전투 디스플레이 모듈을 찾는 거예요.&n무슨 말인지 알겠어요?

1000605443.english: So let's get ready for battle right now. Right now. It's for our own good.
1000605443.korean: 그러니 얼른 전투나 준비하도록 해요. &n지금 당장. 그게 우리 자기를 위한 거니까.

1000605444.english: Yes... if that is your will, Master...

1000605445.english: Haha. This method is definitely the fastest.
1000605445.korean: 후후. 역시 이 방법이 제일 빠르군요.

1000605446.english: Dear Constantia, your shoulders are too tense. So you need some shock therapy.
1000605446.korean: 자기 콘스탄챠 양은 어깨에 힘이 너무 들어가 있어요.&n그러니 충격 요법이 좀 필요하다구요.

1000605447.english: This way, Constantia's vision will broaden a bit. Well, it'll be a bit sad for a while...
1000605447.korean: 이래야 콘스탄챠 양도 시야가 좀 넓어지겠죠.&n뭐, 잠깐은 좀 슬프겠지만...

1000605448.english: I'm going to go now, just in case you're somewhere secretly shedding tears.
1000605448.korean: 혹시라도 어디 가서 몰래 눈물이라도 흘리고 있을 지 모르니&n전 이만 가볼게요.

1000605449.english: Honey, you should go to sleep now. Honey, I'll see you in my dreams~!
1000605449.korean: 자기도 이만 자도록 해요. 우리 자기, 꿈 속에서 만나요~!

1000605451.english: Huh? Princess? What did you find?

1000605452.english: Hehe. I found that factory. That battle... mode? Anyway, that factory. I found factory number 22. Is this it?
1000605452.korean: 헤헤. 나, 그 공장 찾았거든. 그 전투... 모드였나?&n어쨌든 그 공장. 22번 공장 찾았어. 이거 맞지?

1000605453.english: Oh my... I was worried about losing the records anyway... &n You did a great job, our princess.
1000605453.korean: 어머나... 그러지 않아도 기록이 유실되서 걱정했는데...&n정말 잘했어요. 우리 공주님.

1000605455.english: Our princess. &n By the way, aren't we playing True Ancestor today?
1000605455.korean: 우리 공주님. &n그러고보니 오늘은 진조 놀이를 안 하는 건가요?

1000605457.english: Heh. Heh. Heh. I don't know what you mean by playing. &n Ah... Are you saying that I'm pretending to be an ordinary Bioroid and having fun?
1000605457.korean: 큭. 큭. 큭. 놀이라니 무슨 말인지 모르겠군.&n아... 이 내가 평범한 바이오로이드인 척 유희를 하는 것 말인가?

1000605458.english: My closest vassal, Amy... As expected, she recognizes me quickly.
1000605458.korean: 가장 가까운 가신인 내 권속 에이미... 역시 금방 알아보는군.

1000605459.english: Haha. But you're really good when you're serious. Well, shall we get ready, Princess?
1000605459.korean: 후후. 그래도 진지하게 할 때는 잘 하는 군요.&n자, 그럼 슬슬 준비할까요? 공주님?

1000605460.english: We should give our cute Constantia a pair of invisible glasses.
1000605460.korean: 우리 귀여운 콘스탄챠 양에게 보이지 않는 안경을 선물해야 할 테니.

1000605461.english: Really... I guess I'll have to avoid such a rigged factory from now on.
1000605461.korean: 정말... 이렇게 철충화된 공장은 다음부턴 피해야겠군요.

1000605463.english: Haha. You've regained some confidence, Miss Constantia. Anyway, now that you've found the module, you can finally take off those glasses you were worried about?
1000605463.korean: 후후. 자신감을 조금 찾았군요. 콘스탄챠 양.&n어쨌든 모듈을 찾았으니 걱정하던 안경을 벗을 수 있게 됐네요?

1000605464.english: More than that... &n What if after the surgery, our honey says she likes Constantia better with glasses?
1000605464.korean: 그것보다... &n수술 후에 우리 자기가 콘스탄챠 양에게 안경 쓴 게 더 좋았다고 하면 어쩔 건가요?

1000605465.english: ...Smart glasses can also be turned off... &n because that feature isn't really needed anymore...
1000605465.korean: ... 스마트 글래스는 기능을 끌 수도 있어요... &n이제 그 기능이 꼭 필요한 건 아니니...

1000605466.english: As expected, Miss Constantia loves us more than I do. She is a wonderful maid.
1000605466.korean: 역시 우리 자기를 나보다 훨씬 사랑하는 콘스탄챠 양이군요.&n훌륭한 메이드예요.

1000605470.english: Huh... Really? Oh my... I guess I should be nervous? &n With that expression on your face right now... I don't know if we'll lose our lover.
1000605470.korean: 흐응... 그래요? 어머나.. 긴장해야겠네?&n지금 그 표정이면... 우리 자기를 빼앗길 지도 모르겠네요.

1000605471.english: ...From the beginning, Master was not Amy's.
1000605471.korean: ... 처음부터 주인님은 에이미 양의 것이 아니에요.

1000605472.english: I know. I know. Okay, let's get started. &n Modular implant surgery takes quite a while.
1000605472.korean: 알아요. 알아. 자, 그것보다 출발해 볼까요?&n모듈 임플란트 수술에는 시간이 제법 많이 걸리니까요.

1000605473.english: Please, I hope you like it.
1000605473.korean: 부디, 우리 자기가 좋아해 줬으면 좋겠네요.

1000605476.english: Um... what do you think? I took off my glasses...

1000605477.english: Is that so? That's fortunate. I was worried that you might not like it.
1000605477.korean: 역시 그런가요? 다행이에요.&n혹시나 주인님께서 좋아하지 않으시면 하고 걱정했어요.

1000605478.english: And... if you need me to show you with glasses, please let me know.
1000605478.korean: 그리고... 혹시라도 안경을 쓴 모습이 필요하시면 말씀해 주세요.

1000605479.english: I'm sure the smart glasses are well kept.
1000605479.korean: 스마트 글래스는 잘 보관하고 있을 테니까요.

1000605480.english: Is that so? ... I guess I was too suspicious of you, Master.
1000605480.korean: 그런가요? ... 제가 너무 주인님을 의심했나 보네요.

1000605481.english: Don't worry. Wearing glasses won't make any difference...
1000605481.korean: 걱정 마세요. 안경을 쓴다고 특별히 달라지는 것도 없을 테니...

1000605482.english: And you can take off your glasses at any time... &n Just let me know if you want to see that look.
1000605482.korean: 그리고 안경은 언제든 벗을 수 있으니...&n그 모습이 보고 싶을 땐 말씀을 해주세요.

1000605483.english: I... can take off my clothes as much as I want for my master...
1000605483.korean: 전... 주인님을 위해서라면 얼마든지 벗을 수 있으니까요...

1000605485.english: Maybe... I was just thinking about useless things.
1000605485.korean: 어쩌면... 괜히 제가 쓸데 없는 생각을 하고 있었는지도 모르겠네요.

1000605486.english: The master was looking at me correctly, with or without glasses...
1000605486.korean: 주인님은 안경이 있건없건 절 올바르게 보시고 계셨는데...

1000605487.english: I'm sorry, Master... I guess I worried unnecessarily.
1000605487.korean: 죄송해요. 주인님... 제가 쓸데 없이 걱정을 했었나 봐요.

1000605489.english: Hehe... Not at all... I'll be heading in now... Have a comfortable night.
1000605489.korean: 후훗... 별말씀을... 전 이만 들어가 볼게요... 편안한 밤 되세요.

1000605491.english: It seems the Commander plans to use the “virtual reality access device.”
1000605491.korean: 사령관님께서 '가상현실 접속 장치'를 쓰실 계획이신 것 같아요.

1000605493.english: If it’s the Commander… they’ll probably charge straight in…

1000605495.english: Heading in there without securing all the access devices…
1000605495.korean: 접속기를 전부 확보하지도 않은 상태로, 거길 들어가겠다니...

1000605496.english: Sigh… Anyway, those maids are a problem too. Not stopping them, just… what are they thinking? Makes me angrier the more I think about it!
1000605496.korean: 휴... 아무튼 저 메이드들도 문제야. 말릴 생각은 안 하고 대체 뭘 하는 거야? &n생각하니 점점 화가 나는 거 있지?

1000605497.english: Calm down, Captain. Seeing your fingers trembling over the button is nerve-wracking.
1000605497.korean: 진정하세요 대장. 지금 버튼 위에서 손가락 떨고 있는 거, 보기 불안하니까요.

1000605499.english: Yes. Once we secure the access device, Fortune will assist.
1000605499.korean: 네. 접속기만 확보하면 포츈님이 도와주시기로 하셨어요.

1000605500.english: Good. Leave the rest to the Commander then. We have our work to do.
1000605500.korean: 좋아. 빚은 사령관 앞으로 달아둬. 우린 우리 할 일을 해야지.

1000605501.english: Doom Bringer Team, commence operation! The chain of command comes ‘directly’ from the Commander. Don’t even think about arguing.
1000605501.korean: 둠 브링어 팀. 지금부터 활동 시작한다. 지휘권은 사령관에게 '직접' 받은 거니.&n토 달 생각 말라고

1000605502.english: Destination: Research lab. Objective: the access device user. Rules of engagement? Eliminate on sight. The rest, I’ll handle.
1000605502.korean: 목적지는 연구소. 목표는 접속기의 사용자. 교전 수칙?&n발견 즉시 날려버려. 나머지는 내가 알아서 할게.

1000605503.english: Heh… This reminds me of a novel I read once. The title… I think it was something like “Musha.”
1000605503.korean: 훗... 예전에 비슷한 내용의 소설책을 본 기억이 나네요. &n제목이... 무슨 '무사'였던 걸로 기억하는데...

1000605504.english: Glad you liked the book. Shall I lend it to you again?
1000605504.korean: 책이 마음에 드셨다니 다행이네요. 다시 빌려드릴까요?

1000605505.english: There's no time for that. What if our Commander comes back dazed from stupidity?
1000605505.korean: 다들? 이럴 시간 없어. 우리 사령관이 멍청해져서 돌아오면 어떻게 할 거야?

1000605507.english: No, Night Angel. Only I can call the Commander stupid! Got it? Are you Jealous?
1000605507.korean: 안돼. 나이트앤젤. 사령관을 멍청이라고 할 수 있는건, 나 뿐이거든?&n어때? 부럽지?

1000605508.english: Hm… Not really worth responding to.

1000605509.english: Doom Bringer Team? One request—don’t say we missed the target!
1000605509.korean: 둠 브링어 팀? 부탁인데, 목표를 놓쳤다는 말은 하지 말아 줘.

1000605510.english: We missed it, Captain. Repeating: the enemy was missed!

1000605511.english: I’ll note in the report that such sloppy command was the issue… questioning the commander’s… competency…
1000605511.korean: 문서에는, 허술한 지휘가 문제였다고 기록해 둘께요.&n지휘관... 자질... 부족... 의심...

1000605512.english: Enough! Don’t worry about any reports like that. Daika?
1000605512.korean: 됐어, 네 보고 같은 거 하나도 신경 안 써.&n다이카?

1000605513.english: All access devices have been secured. Fortune helped a lot.
1000605513.korean: 접속기는 전부 구했습니다. 포츈님이 많이 도와주셨거든요.

1000605514.english: As expected~. Doom Bringer really is just you, Daika. Don’t you agree, Night Angel?
1000605514.korean: 역시~. 둠 브링어는 다이카밖에 없어. 너도 그렇게 생각하지? 나이트앤젤?

1000605515.english: Hehe~ Just lucky, really. Also… here are the observations on the access device user.
1000605515.korean: 후후~ 운이 좋았을 뿐이죠. 그리고, 여기... 접속기 사용자 관측 결과입니다.

1000605517.english: Huh, not that impressive. So, what now?
1000605517.korean: 뭐, 그리 대단할 건 없네요. 이제 어떻게 할까요?

1000605519.english: Captain May? We need your orders. Time isn’t on our side.
1000605519.korean: 메이 대장님? 지시를 부탁드려요. 시간이 그리 많지 않으니.

1000605520.english: So… this was all just a test?

1000605521.english: Yes, that’s right. Fortunately, our Commander passed without any issues.
1000605521.korean: 네 맞아요. 다행히 우리 사령관님께서는 무리없이 통과하셨고요.

1000605522.english: A commander test… I wish someone else could take it at least once…
1000605522.korean: 지휘관 테스트라... 누군가도 한 번쯤 받아 봤으면 좋겠는데...

1000605523.english: I’ll cancel it, so could you do something about that finger?
1000605523.korean: 취소할 테니, 그 손가락 좀 어떻게 해주시겠어요?

1000605524.english: My ethics module has a low limit, so it reacts easily in strange situations.
1000605524.korean: 내 윤리 모듈은 리미트가 낮아서, 이상한 곳에서 쉽게 반응한단 말이야.

1000605525.english: Hehe… Captain May? I’m curious about something.
1000605525.korean: 후훗... 메이 대장님? 제가 궁금한 게 하나 있는데.

1000605527.english: Why don’t you tell the Commander separately?
1000605527.korean: 어째서 사령관님께는 따로 알리지 않으시는 거죠?

1000605529.english: That’s because of Captain May’s unnecessary pride and twisted affection. A lonely girl who wants to seem special and be loved…
1000605529.korean: 그건, 메이 대장의 쓸 데 없는 자존심과, 일그러진 애정 때문이죠.&n특별해 보이고 싶고, 사랑받고 싶어 하는 한 외로운 소녀의...

1000605531.english: Target spotted in sight. Requesting bombardment. Coordinates are…
1000605531.korean: 시야에 목표물 확인. 폭격을 요청합니다. 좌표는...

1000605532.english: Communication interference detected. Bombardment support is canceled. So it’s you, Commander.
1000605532.korean: 통신 교란 발생. 폭격 지원을 취소합니다.&n사령관님이시군요.

1000605533.english: What… what’s happening? Commander?! Why on earth…
1000605533.korean: 이게... 무슨 일이야? 사령관?! 대체 왜...

1000605534.english: Hehe, it doesn’t matter. We’ll just start over.
1000605534.korean: 후후, 아무려면 어때요. 다시 시작하는 거죠.

1000605535.english: I had them all… I had them all…
1000605535.korean: 다 잡은 건데... 전부 다 잡는 건데...

1000605536.english: Connection signal is weakening. It looks like further tracking will be impossible.
1000605536.korean: 연결 신호가 약해졌어요. 더 이상 추적은 힘들 것 같네요.

1000605537.english: Pull yourself together, Captain. Let’s get back quickly!

1000605538.english: So… Commander, you knew everything our team was doing… That’s what you mean?
1000605538.korean: 그래서... 사령관님께서는 우리 팀이 뭘 하고 있었는지 다 알고 계셨다...&n그 말이지?

1000605539.korean: - 메이는 아직도 화가 많이 나 있는듯하다.

1000605540.english: And, if you were going to forcibly return us anyway, why did you hand over command?
1000605540.korean: 그리고 말인데, 멋대로 강제 복귀 시킬 거면, 지휘권은 왜 넘겨준 거야?

1000605543.english: Hey, Commander? I’m a war-class Bioroid at the level of a commander. Did you forget I’m designed to make strategic decisions too?
1000605543.korean: 있지, 사령관? 난 지휘관급 전쟁용 바이오 로이드야. 전략적 판단도 할 수 있게&n설계된 거 잊었어?

1000605544.english: I wracked my brain to get that far…

1000605545.english: No, no, what’s the point in telling you? You’ll forget again soon.
1000605545.korean: 아냐 아냐, 이야기해봐야 뭐 해. 금방 또 잊을 건데.

1000605546.english: But… this one, Commander, you have to be clear about. Can I trust you and leave this matter to Doom Bringer?
1000605546.korean: 다만... 이건 사령관이 확실하게 해 줘야겠어.&n날 믿고 둠 브링어에 이번 일을 맡길 수 있겠어?

1000605547.english: - I’ll take care of May and Doom Bringer…

1000605548.english: Hmph. You should’ve come out like that from the start!

1000605549.english: I’ll take care of the minor stuff, so Commander, just keep your promises… Being humiliated in front of your subordinates once is enough.
1000605549.korean: 사소한 건 내가 알아서 처리할 테니까, 사령관은 약속이나 잘 지켜줘.&n… 부하들 앞에서 망신 당하는 건, 한 번이면 충분하니까.

1000605550.english: Stop! Doom Bringer team, fall back. That Metal Parasite… is actually using its brain?
1000605550.korean: 그만. 둠 브링어팀 복귀한다. 저 철충 녀석... 머리 좀 쓰는걸?

1000605551.english: Why? The enemy is right in front of us.

1000605552.english: The data is too close. If we bomb it halfheartedly, no matter what Scathy does, recovery will be impossible.
1000605552.korean: 데이터가 너무 가까워. 어설프게 폭격했다간, 스카디가 무슨 수를 써도&n복구 불가능할 거야.

1000605554.english: I can’t believe our captain has grown this much… it’s touching.

1000605555.english: … Indeed. Seems like someone caused a slight issue with their judgment.
1000605555.korean: ... 그러게. 누구 때문에 판단력에 약간 문제가 생긴 것 같긴 해.

1000605556.english: We’re changing the target. The top priority is the ones that could pose a threat to the ‘Commander’. You know what that means, right?
1000605556.korean: 목표를 수정한다. 최우선 목표는 '사령관'에게 위험이 될 만한 녀석들로.&n무슨 뜻인지 알지?

1000605558.english: I think it would be more efficient to target the Metal Parasites using the interface.
1000605558.korean: 접속기를 사용하는 철충을 잡는 게 효율적이라 생각합니다만.

1000605559.english: Captain May seems to want to avoid a situation where data is lost.
1000605559.korean: 메이 대장님은 데이터가 손실되는 상황을 피하고 싶으신것 같아요.

1000605560.english: Hmm… I see… so that’s the case.

1000605562.english: Captain May had forgotten the fact that the Commander is needed…
1000605562.korean: 메이 대장에겐, 사령관님이 필요하다는 사실을... 잊고 있었네요.

1000605563.english: Wait! Did I hear that wrong?

1000605564.english: Hehe, then shall we deploy the Doom Bringer team?
1000605564.korean: 후후, 그러면 둠 브링어팀 출격해 볼까요?

1000605565.english: The operation was a success. We reduced the number of Metal Parasites to the target count.
1000605565.korean: 작전 성공했어요. 목표 수치까지 철충의 머릿수를 줄였어요.

1000605566.english: We can celebrate today. Doom Bringer did their best!
1000605566.korean: 오늘은 자축하며 보내도 좋아. 둠 브링어는 최선을 다했으니까.

1000605567.english: As expected, our team handles things most efficiently.
1000605567.korean: 역시, 우리 팀이 일 처리는 제일 깔끔하지.

1000605568.english: … Remember Djinnia, who was shot down while protecting the captain.
1000605568.korean: ... 대장을 지키려다 격추된 지니야를 기억해 주세요.

1000605569.english: Djinnia? Oh, right. Don’t worry. Someone like Djinnia will be fine.
1000605569.korean: 지니야? 그랬었나? 걱정마. 지니야 정도면 문제 없을거야.

1000605570.english: There were no external injuries, but it must have been horribly painful. I’ll check on them in the recovery room.
1000605570.korean: 외상은 없었지만, 분명 끔찍하게 고통스러웠을 테죠. 수복실엔 제가&n다녀오겠어요.

1000605571.english: Do you have something to say to me, Captain?
1000605571.korean: 제게 뭔가 할 말이라도 있나요 대장?

1000605572.english: I just wanted to say thank you. Good work.

1000605573.english: I just did my job. We were created to back up the Captain, after all.
1000605573.korean: 제 할 일을 한 거죠. 저희는 대장을 백업하기 위해 만들어 졌으니까요.

1000605574.english: Well, thinking that our painstaking efforts were just a preparatory move for pressing a single button does feel a bit anticlimactic.
1000605574.korean: 뭐, 저희의 피나는 노력이 버튼 한번 누르기 위한 준비 동작이라 생각하면&n조금 맥빠지는 것도 사실이지만요.

1000605575.english: Are you… jealous of me? If you want, I can let you sit for a bit.
1000605575.korean: 혹시... 이런 내가 부러워? 원한다면 잠깐 정도는 앉게 해줄 수 있어.

1000605577.english: Hah. You can be honest. I’m in a really good mood today. I’ll listen to anything.
1000605577.korean: 훗. 솔직하게 말해도 좋아. 오늘은 기분이 정말 좋으니까. 뭐든 들어줄게.

1000605578.english: That seat should be occupied by the Commander who can press that button. I’ll pass.
1000605578.korean: 그 자리엔 그 버튼을 누를 수 있는 지휘관이 앉아야겠지요?&n저는 사양하겠어요.

1000605579.english: What’s this… all of a sudden so serious?

1000605580.english: Maybe Night Angel wants to say that everyone has their own role to play?
1000605580.korean: 나이트앤젤은 각자가 할 일이 있다는 말을 하고 싶은 게 아닐까요?

1000605581.english: You came back early. How’s Djinnia?

1000605582.english: It felt like I was bothering her while she was eating, so I left her alone. I'm relieved.
1000605582.korean: 제가 음식을 먹는데 방해가 되는 것 같아, 자리를 피해드렸어요.&n정말 다행이에요.

1000605583.english: See? I told you it would be fine. The operation ends here. I’m going to rest a little now.
1000605583.korean: 봐. 별문제 없을 거라 그랬지? 작전은 여기서 종료.&n난 이제 조금 쉬어야겠어.

1000605584.english: … I can feel the Captain changing little by little. Especially in terms of compassion…
1000605584.korean: ... 아무래도 대장이 조금씩 변하는 게 느껴지네요. 특히 동정심이라든지...

1000605585.english: Hehe… Couldn’t all of this be thanks to our kind Commander?
1000605585.korean: 후후... 이 모든 건 인자하신 우리 사령관님 덕분이 아닐까요?

1000605586.english: What will happen… we’ll have to wait and see a bit longer.

1000605587.english: I think Tomo is right? I think I've heard the term "pusher hand" too!
1000605587.korean: 토모 쪽이 맞는 것 같은데?&n나도 풋쳐핸접이란 말을 들은 적이 있는 것 같아!

1000605588.english: Really... &n Master? I was going to tell you anyway...
1000605588.korean: 정말...&n저, 주인님? 그러지 않아도 말씀드리려고 하긴 했는데...

1000605589.english: Ah! Master? It's because of what I told you last time.

1000605590.english: Master, may we go out and look for it?

1000605592.english: Oh, the teacher is Tomo from the 080 institution. I was worried because there weren't any suitable teachers, so I'm really glad that I have a volunteer like this.
1000605592.korean: 아, 선생님은 080 기관의 토모에요. 마땅한 선생님이 없어 걱정이 많았는데, &n이렇게 지원자가 생겨서 정말 다행이에요.

1000605593.english: Yes? Is there something wrong, sir?
1000605593.korean: 네? 뭔가 문제가 될만한 게 있나요 주인님?

1000605594.english: We'll do that, Master. We'll only be going to areas where safety is guaranteed, so don't worry too much.
1000605594.korean: 그렇게 할게요 주인님. 저희는 안전이 확보된 구역만 다녀올 테니,&n너무 걱정 마세요.

1000605595.english: You're back. You've worked really hard, LRL.

1000605596.english: It was a lot heavier than I thought, but I'm okay since Griffon carried it anyway.
1000605596.korean: 생각보다 되게 무거웠는데, 어차피 그리폰이 다 들고 온 거라서 난 괜찮아.

1000605597.english: Okay... English book and... Math book... &n Oh, that's right!

1000605598.english: I've definitely collected the "sex education" book Constantia requested. It's absolutely essential for humanity, you say? We never miss even the smallest details.
1000605598.korean: 콘스탄챠가 부탁한 '성교육' 책도 틀림없이 수거해 왔지. 인간을 위해 꼭 필요하다며?&n짐은 사소한 것도 놓치지 않느니라.

1000605601.english: Master? I... There are children in Orca who haven't received basic education yet... &n So, what I'm saying is...
1000605601.korean: 주인님? 저... 오르카엔 아직까지 기초 교육을 받지 못한 아이들이 있어서...&n그러니까, 제 말은...

1000605602.english: ... Thank you for your concern, Master.

1000605603.english: Tomo? Here! Here is the English textbook. You said you were good at English, right? I told my familiar that you just need to teach it.
1000605603.korean: 토모? 자! 여기 영어 교과서야.&n네가 영어 잘 한 댔지? 내가 권속에게 말해서 네가 가르치면 된다고 했거든?

1000605605.english: Constantia. I heard you were looking for a teacher to teach cute children... Is that right?
1000605605.korean: 콘스탄챠.&n귀여운 아이들을 가르칠 교사를 찾는다고 하던데... 맞나요?

1000605606.english: The electric shocker is an essential tool for dealing with unruly students. To add to that, it works really well on both bioroids and humans, you know?
1000605606.korean: 전기 충격기는 제멋대로 구는 학생들을 다루는데 꼭 필요한 교편이죠.&n덧붙이자면, 바이오로이드와 인간님을 가리지 않고 정말 잘 듣는답니다?
