1000605608.english: Hehe. If you say it is absolutely necessary for the training, Master won't refuse, so please make sure to get it for me.
1000605608.korean: 후훗. 교육에 꼭 필요하다고 하면, 주인님도 거절하지 않으실 테니.&n그걸 꼭 구해다 주세요.

1000605609.english: Um... Sister? Will Master really allow it? Electricity is dangerous...
1000605609.korean: 저... 언니? 주인님이 정말 허락해 주실까요? 전기는 위험한데...

1000605610.english: To think such an innocent maid... Constantia, aren't you curious about what your master wants?
1000605610.korean: 이렇게 순진한 메이드라니...&n콘스탄챠는 주인님이 원하는 게 뭔지 궁금하지 않나요?

1000605611.english: I don't know what my sister is saying...

1000605612.english: Hmm... I don't have much time today, so I'll just tell you a really simple method.
1000605612.korean: 흠... 오늘은 시간이 없으니, 정말 간단한 방법만 알려줄게요.

1000605613.english: If you want to know your master's true feelings, you would be best to escort him to the most secret and darkest place in Orca.
1000605613.korean: 주인님의 진심이 알고 싶다면.&n오르카의 가장 은밀하고, 어두운 곳으로 모시는 게 좋을 거예요.

1000605614.english: Because... and... Master isn't honest in bright places. Hehe...
1000605614.korean: 왜냐하면...&n... 밝은 곳에서의 주인님은 솔직하지 못하시거든요. 후후...

1000605615.english: Huh? Oh, it's Constantia! You mean education, right? Hohoho...

1000605616.english: Here you are. What kind of punishment would be appropriate for a student who is late to class? Please give me an answer that satisfies me, Tomo.
1000605616.korean: 여기 있었군요. 수업에 늦는 학생에게는, 어떤 벌이 적당할까요?&n제가 만족할만한 답을 주세요. 토모 학생.

1000605618.english: You're wrong. There's no more opportunity for Tomo, the student who's already thinking of making excuses. Go back to the classroom and wait in a "learning posture."
1000605618.korean: 틀렸어요. 변명할 생각부터 하는 토모 학생에게 더 이상 기회는 없어요.&n얼른 교실로 돌아가서, '배우는 자세'로 대기하세요.

1000605619.english: Yes? Yes! Understand. Bye bye Constantia.
1000605619.korean: 네? 예스! 언더 스탠. 바이 바이 콘스탄챠.

1000605620.english: Wait, wait... Wait a minute. Student Tomo? Stand there.
1000605620.korean: 잠시, 잠시... 잠시만요. 토모 학생? 거기 서 보세요.

1000605622.english: During English class, they would have clearly stated that stockings above the knee were against the rules...
1000605622.korean: 영어 수업'시간엔, 무릎 위로 올라가는 스타킹이 교칙 위반이라고&n분명 전달했을 텐데...

1000605623.english: ...Depending on the class content, is the dress code different...?
1000605623.korean: ... 수업 내용에 따라, 복장이 다른 건가요...?

1000605624.english: Shh! I'm talking to a student right now. Don't interrupt, Constantia.
1000605624.korean: 쉿! 지금은 학생과 이야기 중이에요. 끼어들면 곤란해요, 콘스탄챠.

1000605625.english: I remember! I'll go change! Just look at it once. Freeze!
1000605625.korean: 기억났어! 가서 갈아 신을게요! 한 번만 봐주세요. 프리즈!

1000605627.english: Hehe, Constantia. The essence of a student never changes, regardless of the times. And my teaching methods haven't changed much either.
1000605627.korean: 후훗, 콘스탄챠. 시대 불문하고 학생의 본질은 변하지 않아요.&n그리고, 제 교육방식 또한 크게 바뀌지 않았죠.

1000605628.english: I just offer advice and a harsh punishment... &n ... It's up to the students how they take that 'punishment'.
1000605628.korean: 저는 그저 조언과 따끔한 체벌을 제공할 뿐... &n... 그 '체벌'을 어떻게 받아들일지는 오로지 학생들의 몫이랍니다.

1000605629.english: Okay, then... shall we begin the class?

1000605631.english: I, uh… had something to say, ah~! How do I even start? Wait, let me think for a moment…
1000605631.korean: 그게, 할 말이 있었는데, 아~! 이건 대체 어떻게 말을 꺼내지?&n저, 잠시만 생각 좀 하고.

1000605632.english: Well… when I went to scout the lab, I think I left something important behind. If the human allows it, I can go get it by myself really quickly. Is that okay?
1000605632.korean: 저기 있지, 내가 연구실로 정찰 갔을 때, 중요한 걸 흘리고 온 것 같아서. &n인간이 허락만 해주면. 나 혼자서 금방 다녀올게. 괜찮지?

1000605633.english: Don’t tell me… you don’t want to let me go?

1000605634.english: No! There’s really no need for that! I can handle it on my own. It’s not that dangerous, and I’m not going there to fight…
1000605634.korean: 아냐! 정말 그럴 필요 없어! 나 혼자면, 완전 충분하다니까?&n그렇게 위험한 곳도 아니고, 전투하러 가는 것도 아니니까...

1000605636.english: So… you were going to go alone to find the virtual reality connector?
1000605636.korean: 그래서... 가상 현실 접속기를 찾으러, 혼자 가려 했던 거니?

1000605638.english: No need, Fortune was going to help, wasn’t it? Why would you do something like that? You nearly put the others in danger!
1000605638.korean: 그건 포츈 씨가 도와주는 걸로, 이야기가 끝났잖니? 대체 왜 그런 짓을...&n하마터면 다른 인원들이 위험할 뻔했잖니?

1000605641.english: … I don’t really get what you mean.

1000605642.english: That’s… weird, right? I ended up burning through a ton of supplies on this sortie.
1000605642.korean: 그건... 이상하잖아? 난 이번 출격으로 군수품만 왕창 써댔는걸?

1000605644.english: … I can write as many reports as needed. Just let me go now…
1000605644.korean: ... 경위서라면 몇 장이든 쓸 테니까. 이제 돌려보내 줘..

1000605648.english: Where… where did you learn that creepy tone?! Don’t do that again!
1000605648.korean: 그... 그런 소름 돋는 말투는 대체 어디서 배운 거야?! &n하지 마! 그런 거!

1000605649.english: Human! Are you mad? How can I make you feel better? Please, anything, just say something!
1000605649.korean: 인간! 화났어? 어떻게 하면 화가 풀릴 것 같아?&n제발, 뭐든 좋으니까 말 좀 해봐.

1000605652.english: I’m putting my trust in you too, Griffon. Please take good care of Orca’s skies.
1000605652.korean: 나도 그리폰만 믿고 있어. 오르카의 하늘을 잘 부탁해.

1000605654.english: Wow~! Me, an infantryman, on a mission with CaptainMarie. Truly an honor, I tell you!
1000605654.korean: 햐~! 이거, 저 같은 보병이 마리 대장님과 임무라니.&n진짜 영광이지 말입니다.

1000605655.english: Captain might not remember, but I…
1000605655.korean: 대장님은 기억하고 계실지 모르지만, 제가 말입니다...

1000605656.english: Stop with the nonsense, Brownie! Are you trying to put the Captain in a difficult position too?
1000605656.korean: 멍청한 소리 그만두세요 브라우니. 대장님까지 곤란하게 만들 생각입니까?

1000605657.english: I’m just too happy, that’s all. But, you see…
1000605657.korean: 이거, 너무 기분이 좋아서 그만.&n그런데 말입니다.

1000605658.english: Hehe. I’m listening, soldier. What’s on your mind?
1000605658.korean: 후후. 듣고 있다 병사. 궁금한 게 뭐지?

1000605659.english: I seem to have forgotten what our mission was.

1000605661.english: ... Reconnaissance. There was a Metal Parasite connection in the virtual reality. All forces are on high alert now!
1000605661.korean: ... 정찰입니다. 가상현실에서 철충의 접속이 있었어요. &n지금 전 병력이 비상상태란 말입니다!

1000605662.english: Ah! That’s an easy mission for Brownies! Let’s depart quickly.
1000605662.korean: 아! 그 정도야 브라우니들한텐, 너무 쉬운 임무지 말입니다.&n얼른 출발하지 말입니다.

1000605663.english: Hah! That was really tough. My palms are sweating so much right now. I just kept firing without rest. My wrists are completely exhausted!
1000605663.korean: 흐아! 이거, 정말 힘들었지 말입니다. 지금 손바닥이 찌릿찌릿할 정도임다.&n쉬지 않고 쏴 댔지 말입니다. 손목에 힘이 하나도 없지 말입니다.

1000605664.english: I know that Brownies intentionally empty some magazines because carrying ammo on the back is heavy and bothersome.
1000605664.korean: 브라우니가 탄을 가지고 복귀하는 게 무겁고 귀찮아서, 탄창을 일부러 비우는 것&n정도는 저도 다 알고 있습니다

1000605665.english: Wow! Even Leprechaun knew that, how embarrassing!
1000605665.korean: 햐! 이거, 레프리콘도 알고 있었다니, 부끄럽지 말입니다.

1000605666.english: But, you see. I remember firing all through the mission. Do you happen to know what our mission actually was?
1000605666.korean: 그런데 말입니다. 임무 내내 총을 쏜 건 기억나는데.&n혹시, 우리 임무가 뭐였는지 알고 계심까?

1000605667.english: This mission was reconnaissance. There was a Metal Parasite connection in the virtual reality…
1000605667.korean: 이번 임무는 정찰이었습니다. 가상현실에서 철충의 접속이...

1000605668.english: How many times do I have to tell you, Brownie, before you understand?! There’s a limit to someone's stupidity!
1000605668.korean: 브라우니는 대체 몇 번을 전달해줘야 알아들을 수 있습니까?!&n멍청한 것도 정도가 있지!

1000605669.english: Ugh… It gets difficult if you’re angry at me. Could that be a different Brownie? Come to think of it, even we look exactly the same.
1000605669.korean: 으어... 저한테 화내도 곤란하지 말입니다. 혹시 그건 다른 브라우니 아님까?&n생각해보면, 저희가 봐도 저희는 정말 똑같이 생겼지만 말임다.

1000605670.english: Still, next time, please check the service numbers. Even I can get hurt otherwise.
1000605670.korean: 그래도 다음부턴, 군번을 확인해주시면 고맙지 말입니다.&n아무리 저라도 상처받지 말입니다.

1000605671.english: That… that’s my fault. I apologize.

1000605674.english: So, before deployment, the Brownies knew the objective. Are you saying you deployed without even confirming the goal of this operation?
1000605674.korean: 그렇다면, 출격 전의 브라우니는 목표를 숙지 했지만.&n자네는 이번 작전의 목표조차 확인하지 않고 출격했었다는 뜻인가?

1000605675.english: Yes! That’s right. But still, we caught a huge number of Metal Parasites!
1000605675.korean: 네! 그렇슴다. 그래도 철충은 엄청나게 잡았지 말입니다.

1000605677.english: Hmm. When stamina is low, mental focus naturally drops.
1000605677.korean: 흠. 체력이 부족하면, 집중력이 떨어지기 마련이지.

1000605678.english: How much time do you need? Leprechaun.

1000605679.english: 3 minutes… no. I’ll be ready in 2 minutes.

1000605680.english: I can’t follow this conversation. What’s going on?
1000605680.korean: 이거, 대화를 못 따라가고 있지 말입니다. 무슨 일 있습니까?

1000605684.english: Constantia? I’ve arrived after the call… what exactly happened?
1000605684.korean: 콘스탄챠? 호출 받고 도착했어요... 대체 무슨 일이죠?

1000605685.english: Scathy? Sister? The Master’s fever is serious right now. They can’t even swallow soup today!
1000605685.korean: 스카디양? 언니? 지금 주인님의 열이 심상치 않아요.&n오늘은 수프조차 넘기질 못하고 계세요.

1000605686.english: Could there be a problem with the new body?
1000605686.korean: 새로운 몸에 무슨 문제라도 있는 걸까요?

1000605687.english: Hmm. The new body… Ah… a few possibilities just came to mind.
1000605687.korean: 흠. 새로운 몸이라... &n아... 지금 떠오르는 게 몇 가지 있네요.

1000605688.english: Really? Could Master’s fever be related to ‘Whipnos’?! If this is a symptom of Whipnos… I…
1000605688.korean: 정말인가요? 혹시, 주인님의 열과 '휩노스'가 관계가 있나요?!&n이게 휩노스의 증세라면... 저는...

1000605690.english: Yes, I think I know what’s going on too. Shall we hurry?
1000605690.korean: 네, 저도 어떻게 된 일인지 알 것 같네요. 서두를까요?

1000605692.english: The Commander will recover soon. By the way…

1000605693.english: I didn’t expect the fever to be this high either… It must have been really tough. Watching like this, it almost hurts my heart.
1000605693.korean: 저렇게 열이 많이 나실 줄은 저도 예상 못 했어요. &n... 많이 힘드셨겠죠. 보고 있자니, 제 마음이 아플 정도네요.

1000605694.english: You did well, Scathy. How about you take a good rest too?
1000605694.korean: 수고 많았어요 스카디. 스카디도 푹 쉬는 게 어때요?

1000605695.english: Sister? Is this Whipnos?! What’s happening to Master?
1000605695.korean: 언니? 휩노스인가요?! 주인님께 무슨 일이 벌어진 거죠?

1000605696.english: Hehe… if we keep talking, Constantia might collapse first.
1000605696.korean: 후후... 이야기를 계속하다가는, 콘스탄챠양이 먼저 쓰러지겠어요.

1000605697.english: Constantia? The Master is extremely vulnerable to illness right now. At this moment, Master’s new body…
1000605697.korean: 콘스탄챠? 주인님은 지금 질병에 무척 취약하신 상태셔.&n지금, 주인님의 새로운 몸은...

1000605698.english: No… is the new body not suitable for Master? We should have tested it first.
1000605698.korean: 안돼... 주인님께 새로운 몸이 맞지 않으신 건가요?&n먼저 테스트를 해 봤었어야 했어.

1000605699.english: … For now we’ve used antibiotics, but later we’ll need to administer a vaccine.
1000605699.korean: ... 우선은 항생제를 사용했지만, 앞으로는 백신을 놓아 드려야 해.

1000605702.english: That’s right, Constantia. We’ve brought all the necessary vaccines, so there’s nothing to worry about now.
1000605702.korean: 그래 콘스탄챠. 필요한 백신들은 모두 가져왔으니, 이제는 걱정할 것 없어.

1000605703.english: Even though the Commander’s body looks so strong, really… in a pure state, in terms of immunity, the Commander is no different from a newborn child…
1000605703.korean: 사령관님의 몸은 저렇게 튼튼해 보여도, 정말. 퓨어한 상태에요.&n면역력만 두고 보자면, 사령관님은 갓 태어난 어린아이와 다를 바...

1000605705.english: A… a boy?! Please refrain from making remarks that diminish the dignity of His Excellency!
1000605705.korean: 소… 소년이라니! 각하의 위엄을 떨어트리는 발언은 삼가주게.

1000605706.english: … I feel so pathetic… to have overlooked something so important… If neither Sister nor Scathy had been on Orca…
1000605706.korean: ... 제가 너무 한심해요... 이렇게 중요한 것을 놓치다니...&n만약 오르카에 언니나, 스카디양이 없었더라면...

1000605707.english: I am not worthy of serving Master…

1000605709.english: Yes. I will do so, Master.

1000605710.english: It’s not my place to say this to Your Excellency, but self-reproach is enough for now. Constantia will have many duties ahead in serving Your Excellency.
1000605710.korean: 각하를 두고 할 말은 아니지만, 자책은 그 정도면 충분해.&n콘스탄차는 앞으로도, 각하를 모시고 신경 써야 할 일이 많아.

1000605711.english: Even after making such a mistake… Master, you still understand?
1000605711.korean: 이런 실수를 했는데도... 주인님은 이해해 주시는 건가요?

1000605712.english: Yes. I will serve you with all my best, Master.

1000605713.english: Master? I have something to report.

1000605714.english: Do you perhaps remember Labiata’s sister’s… no. Mr. Jones’s secret laboratory?
1000605714.korean: 혹시, 라비아타 언니의 주... 아니. 존스 씨의 비밀 연구소를 기억하시나요?

1000605715.english: I haven’t checked in detail, but there were quite a few research records there that could be dangerous if they leaked out.
1000605715.korean: 자세하게 확인하지는 못했지만, 그곳에선 밖으로 새나가면 위험할지도 모를&n연구 기록들이 제법 많이 있었어요.

1000605716.english: And… the fact that Metal Parasites keep intruding into spaces that might hold memories of my sister… keeps bothering me.
1000605716.korean: 그리고... 언니의 추억이 담겨있을지도 모를 공간에 철충들이 멋대로&n침입하는 게... 자꾸만 마음에 걸려서요.

1000605717.english: Yes, Master. Then I’ll prepare for deployment immediately.
1000605717.korean: 네, 주인님. 그러면 바로 출격 준비를 할게요.

1000605718.english: - Constantia seemed to have a special affection for Labiata. It’s probably the same the other way around.
1000605718.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 라비아타에 대한 애정이 각별해 보였다.&n그 반대의 경우도 마찬가지일 테지.

1000605719.english: - What does it mean to be sisters? No. Before that, I have no way of knowing what being family feels like.
1000605719.korean: - 자매라는 건 어떤 의미일까? 아니. 그전에,&n가족이라는 것이 어떤 느낌인지 나로서는 알 방법이 없다.

1000605720.english: - … My eyes are closing again. I’ve gotten somewhat used to this sudden wave of ‘fatigue’ that hits me like this. Thanks to that, I’ve even learned a trick to somewhat avoid it.
1000605720.korean: - ... 다시 눈이 감겨온다. 나는 이런 식의 갑자기 쏟아지는 '피로감'에 어느 정도 &n익숙해졌다. 덕분에, 이 피로감을 어느 정도 피할 수 있는 요령까지 생겼다.

1000605721.english: - I emptied my mind and lowered the visor. This is the best I can do.
1000605721.korean: - 나는 머릿속을 비우고, 바이저를 내렸다. 이 정도가, 내가 할 수 있는 최선이다.

1000605722.english: Yes, Master. The list you’re looking at now contains all the research records we were able to collect.
1000605722.korean: 네, 주인님께서 지금 보고 계시는 리스트가 수집할 수 있었던 연구 기록들 전부에요.

1000605723.english: Scathy added some explanations here and there, but if you’re curious about anything, I’ll contact them right away.
1000605723.korean: 스카디양이 어느 정도의 설명은 추가해 두었지만, 혹시나 궁금한 게 있으면&n제가 바로 연락을 해볼게요.

1000605724.english: Yes, Master. And truly, thank you. Thanks to you, my sister will be able to rest easy.
1000605724.korean: 네 주인님. 그리고, 정말 감사드려요 주인님 덕분에, 언니도 안심할 수 있을 거예요.

1000605725.english: - The file Constantia handed me was filled with countless handwritten notes by Scathy, and I began flipping through the list, feeling grateful.
1000605725.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 건네준 파일에는 스카디의 수많은 메모가 자필로&n추가되어 있었고, 나는 고마운 마음으로 리스트를 한 장씩 넘기기 시작했다.

1000605726.english: - On one side of the bridge, there was a mountain of paperwork. The amount of research by Dr. Adam Jones was staggering at a glance.
1000605726.korean: - 함교 한편에는 산처럼 쌓인 서류더미. 애덤 존스라는 박사의&n연구량이란 한눈에 봐도 엄청난 수준이었다.

1000605727.english: - I wonder how long I had been reading when my eyes stopped at the ‘Labiata Project’ section. This must be where Labiata was designed.
1000605727.korean: - 그렇게 얼마나 읽었을까, 나는 '라비아타 프로젝트' 대목에서 눈이 멈췄다.&n여기서, 그 라비아타가 설계된 것이겠지.

1000605728.english: - What was this man thinking as he designed a Bioroid?
1000605728.korean: - 바이오로이드를 설계하며, 이 남자는 무슨 생각을 하고 있었을까.

1000605729.english: - I tried to imagine Adam Jones in the position of the creator, but a slight headache came, and my eyes closed again.
1000605729.korean: - 나는 창조주의 위치에 서있었던 애덤 존스를 상상해보려 했지만, 약간의 두통과&n함께, 다시 눈이 감길 뿐이었다.

1000605730.english: Um… Master? You look tired. Shall I escort you inside?
1000605730.korean: 저... 주인님? 지금 피곤해 보이시는데, 제가 안으로 모실까요?

1000605731.english: - Yeah. I’m probably just a bit fatigued because there’s so much I don’t understand.
1000605731.korean: - 그래. 내가 이해하지 못한 내용들이 많아서 조금 피로해졌을 뿐이겠지.

1000605732.english: Yes, Master. Then, would you follow me this way?
1000605732.korean: 네, 주인님. 그러면, 이쪽으로 저를 따라오시겠어요?

1000605733.english: Right? Isn't that totally funny? Because back then, the human couldn't say anything?
1000605733.korean: 그치? 완전 웃기지? 그때 인간이 아무 말도 못 했거든?

1000605735.english: What did Constantia say then? 'Master~. This time, I am lacking~.'
1000605735.korean: 그때 콘스탄챠가 뭐라고 했냐면...&n'주인니임~. 이번엔 제가 부족해서~.'

1000605736.english: ...Huh? Wait a minute... There's a call.

1000605738.english: Huh? It's Constantia? Guess who I was just talking to?
1000605738.korean: 앙? 콘스탄챠잖아? 내가 방금 누구 이야기하고 있었게?

1000605739.english: I'm sorry, Griffon. I'll hear about that later. I'm really sorry to Griffon, but... another mission has been added urgently.
1000605739.korean: 미안해. 그리폰. 그건 나중에 들을게.&n그리폰에겐 정말 미안한데... 급하게 다른 임무가 추가됐어.

1000605740.english: There's a sister who went out to explore alone and lost contact... I'm sending the final coordinates now, so please check them.
1000605740.korean: 혼자서 탐색을 나갔다가, 연락이 끊긴 자매가 있어...&n지금 최종 좌표를 보낼 테니까, 확인 부탁해.

1000605741.english: Wait, wait! We're on our way back right now. Are you serious?
1000605741.korean: 잠깐, 잠깐만! 우리 지금 복귀 중이잖아. 정말 이러기야?

1000605743.english: Besides, for a night mission, wouldn't it be much better for the Night Angel to go? Why do I have to bring this bundle of luggage too?!
1000605743.korean: 그리고, 야간 임무라면 나이트 앤젤이 가는 게 훨씬 낫잖아?&n왜 내가 짐 덩어리까지 챙겨 와야 되는 거냐구!

1000605744.english: I'd like to, too... but there's a bit of a problem with the chain of command right now... so I really need your help with this.
1000605744.korean: 나도 그러고는 싶지만... 지금 지휘 계통에 조금 문제가 생겨서...&n이번 일은 꼭 좀 부탁할게.

1000605745.english: ... Yes! Master. Did you call me?

1000605746.english: What? What! What are you two doing there?! Constantia?
1000605746.korean: 뭐야? 뭐야! 거기서 둘이 뭐하고 있는 거야?! 콘스탄챠?

1000605747.english: The Commander and Constantia... look super busy right now, don't they? Still... let's not get into any strange misunderstandings. Okay?
1000605747.korean: 사령관님도 콘스탄챠도... 지금 엄청 바빠 보인다 그치?&n그래도... 우리 이상한 오해는 하지 말자. 응?

1000605748.english: A misunderstanding?! What misunderstanding did I have? That's even stranger!
1000605748.korean: 오해라니! 내가 무슨 오해를 했다고 그래? 그게 더 이상하거든?

1000605749.english: I see! So, Griffon is feeling a bit frustrated because something came up suddenly, right? Shall I help you?
1000605749.korean: 알겠다! 그리폰은 일이 갑자기 생겨서, 조금 답답한 거구나?&n내가 도와줄까?

1000605750.english: Ha... Someone is missing, while someone else is just hanging out... and... When we were at the airport, who would have imagined something like this?
1000605750.korean: 하... 누군 지금 실종됐다는데, 누군 지금 놀고있고...&n... 우리가 공항에 있을 때, 이런 일 상상이나 했겠어?

1000605751.english: Hey... I was in an aircraft carrier squadron, you know?

1000605752.english: ... an aircraft carrier or an airfield... it's all the same...

1000605753.english: Anyway, I'm talking about Night Angel. Can't she even help with this one thing? She's always talking about stealth and whatnot. I'm telling you, she's nowhere to be found when it's actually needed.
1000605753.korean: 아무튼, 나이트 앤젤 걔 말이야, 걔는 이거 하나 못 도와준대?&n맨날 스텔스 어쩌고 하더니. 정작 필요할 땐 없다니까?

1000605754.english: From the way I see it, since Constantia is always so intimidated and just watching the Doom Bringer's every move, it seems like the Doom Bringer's guys are starting to look down on us.
1000605754.korean: 내가 봤을 때. 콘스탄챠가 맨날 기죽어서 둠 브링어 눈치만 보고 있으니까,&n둠 브링어 애들이 이제 우릴 만만하게 보는 것 같아.

1000605755.english: It seems like Constanta has her own reasons, too... Let's talk about that later. Okay?
1000605755.korean: 콘스탄차도 무슨 사정이 있는 것 같은데... 그건 나중에 같이 이야기해보자. 응?

1000605756.english: Yeah... what would we know... Ugh! So annoying!
1000605756.korean: 그래... 우리가 뭘 알겠어...&n으! 짜증 나!

1000605757.english: I think Griffon has been on edge lately because she's tired. Is there anything I can do to help?
1000605757.korean: 내 생각에는, 그리폰이 요즘 피곤해서 예민해진 것 같은데. 내가 도와줄 일 없을까?

1000605758.english: Fine. I'm going alone. If I get shot down, you can all regret it then. ... You go back first. Don't bother worrying about it.
1000605758.korean: 됐어. 나 혼자 갈 거야. 나 격추되면 그때 가서 다들 후회하라지.&n... 넌 먼저 돌아가 있어. 괜히 신경 쓰지 말고.

1000605760.english: This is Griffon. I haven't been able to leave yet. Please wait until I contact you first.
1000605760.korean: 여긴 그리폰. 아직 출발 못했어. 내가 먼저 연락할 때까지 기다려.

1000605761.english: I'm sorry for constantly pestering you... And...

1000605763.english: ... I asked Ex to bring it to me... Ah, I don't know...! It smells like mold in here...
1000605763.korean: ... 익스한테 갖다 달라고 부탁했어...&n아, 몰라...! 여기서 곰팡이 냄새나...

1000605764.english: It's been a really long time. Looking at that... it brings back old memories, and it's nice.
1000605764.korean: 정말 오랜만이다. 그걸 보고 있으니까.. 옛날 생각도 나고 좋은 걸?

1000605765.english: Fine, I'm serious right now. If you keep talking about the past, I'm cutting off contact right now.
1000605765.korean: 됐어, 나 지금 진지하거든? &n계속 옛날이야기할 거면 여기서 통신 끊을 거야.

1000605766.english: Okay. Anyway, thank you so much for doing your best, Griffon.
1000605766.korean: 알았어. 아무튼, 최선을 다해줘서 정말 고마워 그리폰.

1000605767.english: Well then, I'll report on the progress.

1000605768.english: The target isn't even on the radar. Either my radar is broken, or their transmitter is broken. Or both... Usually, when this happens... ... No, never mind.
1000605768.korean: 목표가 레이더에도 안 잡혀. 내 레이더가 고장 났거나, 걔 발신기가 고장 났거나.&n둘 다거나... 보통 이렇게 되면... ... 아냐 됐어.

1000605769.english: Okay... I'll record it like that for now.

1000605770.english: We have something to pass on from here as well. It looks like this mission might be too much for you to handle alone, so we’ve deployed one more combatant. You should be able to meet soon.
1000605770.korean: 이쪽에서도 전달할게 있어. 이번 임무가 너 혼자는 버거울 것 같아서,&n전투원을 한 명 더 투입시켰어. 곧 만날 수 있을 거야.

1000605771.english: Huh?! You should have done that earlier! Is it the trend these days to send people on missions one by one?
1000605771.korean: 앙?! 진작 그렇게 해주든가! 요즘은 임무에 한 명씩 투입하는 게 유행이야?

1000605772.english: ... Anyway. I'll finish the report. Since tracking the transmitter is impossible, we have no choice but to search for it visually from now on.
1000605772.korean: ... 아무튼. 마저 보고할게. 발신기 추적이 불가능하니까. 이제부턴&n육안으로 찾아다니는 수밖에 없어.

1000605773.english: It's been a while, so I'm not confident either. Please pray that I don't get caught by the Iron Bugs until I find the target.
1000605773.korean: 나도 오랜만이라 자신 없거든?&n목표물 찾을 때까지 내가 철충한테 안 걸리길 빌어줘.

1000605774.english: That won't do. I can't allow it to proceed like that. Is there no other way?
1000605774.korean: 그건 안 돼. 그런 식으로 진행하는 건 허락할 수 없어.&n다른 방법은 없니?

1000605775.english: Phew... If that were the case, would I be going through all this trouble? Then what am I supposed to do? Should I just declare him missing and go back?
1000605775.korean: 휴... 그런 게 있으면 내가 이 고생을 하고 있겠어?&n그러면 어떻게 해? 그냥 실종 처리하고 복귀할까?

1000605776.english: ... That's not something I can decide... You know that well, Griffon...
1000605776.korean: ... 그건 내가 결정할 수 없는 거... 그리폰도 잘 알잖아...

1000605777.english: I don't have much time. This thing is totally outdated; it's actually a miracle it hasn't been caught by any Iron Bugs yet. Please make a decision quickly.
1000605777.korean: 나 시간 별로 없어. 이거 완전 구형이라, 지금까지 철충한테 안 걸린 게&n신기할 정도거든? 빨리 결정해줘.

1000605778.english: ... I'll leave it to your judgment.

1000605779.english: Isn't that a bit much? If you look closely, even Constantia only chooses what's convenient for her...
1000605779.korean: 그건 너무한 거 아냐?&n가만 보면, 콘스탄챠도 자기 편한 것만 고른다니까...

1000605780.english: Since Griffon is a search expert... I'm leaving this entire operation to you. Whatever choice you make, I will abide by your judgment.
1000605780.korean: 그리폰이 수색 전문가니까... 이번 작전은 전부 네게 맡길게.&n네가 어떤 선택을 하든, 난 네 판단에 따를게.

1000605781.english: I'll keep tracking. Since things have turned out this way, I'm going to try to get to where the signal was lost.
1000605781.korean: 추적 계속할게. 이렇게 된 거, 신호 끊긴 곳까지는 가볼려구.

1000605782.english: Okay. We'll keep that in mind. And... you have to be careful not to get caught. Got it?
1000605782.korean: 알겠어. 우린 그렇게 알고 있을게. 그리고...&n들키지 않게 조심해야 해. 알겠지?

1000605783.english: Okay then... I'll wait here for a moment, so please tell that slowpoke to turn on the line.
1000605783.korean: 알았어. 그럼... &n난 여기서 잠시 대기할 테니까, 그 느림보한테 제발 회선 좀 켜달라고 전해줘.

1000605784.english: Is Slowpoke here? You look so plain. I thought you'd be super fast... but that's not necessarily the case?
1000605784.korean: 느림보 왔어? 되게 밋밋하게 생겨서. 엄청 빠를 줄 알았는데...&n꼭 그렇지만도 않네?

1000605785.english: Haa... I have just as many complaints as you. I put all my urgent work aside to come here, so let's get this over with quickly.
1000605785.korean: 하아... 그쪽만큼 이쪽도 불만 많아요.&n급한 일 다 미뤄두고 왔으니까, 얼른 끝내 버리죠.

1000605786.english: ... By the way... you're wearing quite a serious outfit, aren't you? And besides, that combat suit looks like it has a pretty interesting backstory.
1000605786.korean: ... 그나저나... 그쪽은 꽤 진지한 복장을 하고 있네요?&n게다가, 그 전투 수트에는 제법 재밌는 사연까지 있어 보이네요.

1000605787.english: A funny story? Th... lie. How do you know that?!
1000605787.korean: 재밌는 사연? 거... 거짓말. 네가 그걸 어떻게 알고 있어?!

1000605789.english: Leaving aside the shaky stealth performance typical of older models, I like that desperate attempt.
1000605789.korean: 구형 특유의 애매한 스텔스 성능은 그렇다 치고, 저는 그 필사적인 시도가&n마음에 들어요.

1000605792.english: I just joined up with Slowpoke. But I can't work with her on an operation. I'll have her return right now. Hang up.
1000605792.korean: 방금 느림보랑 합류했어. 근데, 나는 얘랑 같이 작전 못해.&n지금 복귀시킬게. 끊어.

1000605793.english: Wait, return? What do you mean by that all of a sudden?
1000605793.korean: 잠깐, 복귀라니? 갑자기 그게 무슨 말이니?

1000605794.english: No, Ms. Constantia. There is no problem here.
1000605794.korean: 아니요. 콘스탄챠씨. 여긴 아무 문제 없어요.

1000605796.english: Hehe... That was a pretty good attempt. But if you plan to tarnish my career, you'd better give up.
1000605796.korean: 후후... 제법 괜찮은 시도였어요.&n하지만 제 경력에 흠집을 낼 계획이라면, 포기하는 게 좋아요.

1000605797.english: What? What is she suddenly talking about?
1000605797.korean: 뭐? 얘는 갑자기 무슨 소릴 하는 거야?

1000605799.english: Let's stop the small talk and share the progress.
1000605799.korean: 잡담은 그만하고, 진행 상황이나 공유하는 건 어떨까요?&n파트너.

1000605801.english: The signal cut off here. I'll be right back after looking around a bit. Let me know if you find anything.
1000605801.korean: 신호는 여기서 끊겼어. 난 조금 둘러보고 올 테니까. 뭐든 발견하면 말해줘.

1000605802.english: A griffon? Wait. You won't need to go far. ... There are drag marks on the wings right here.
1000605802.korean: 그리폰? 기다려요. 멀리 갈 필요 없겠어요.&n... 여기 날개가 끌린 자국이 있네요.

1000605803.english: ... This is...?&n... Right... I'm sure of it...

1000605804.english: Did something go wrong with the target?

1000605805.english: ... probably thought it was better to walk to the shore than to get hit by a missile that could come from anywhere...
1000605805.korean: ... 어디서 날아올지 모를 미사일에 맞는 것보다는, 해안가까지&n걸어가는 게 좀 더 낫다고 생각했겠지...

1000605806.english: ... Even so... there are too many Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) here... &n... Did you really have to send her all the way to a place like this...?
1000605806.korean: ... 아무리 그래도... 여긴 철충이 너무 많잖아... &n... 정말 이런 곳까지 걔를 보냈어야 했어...?

1000605807.english: Are you worried about your goal?

1000605808.english: I shouldn't have said that. Then, shall we hurry? The sun will rise soon.
1000605808.korean: 제가 괜한 소리를 했네요. 그럼 우리도 서두를까요? 곧 해가 뜰 거예요.

1000605809.english: It's not that I'm worried, but... mission failure is embarrassing... and anyway, troop losses are bad...
1000605809.korean: 걱정되는 건 아니고, 그러니까... 임무 실패는 부끄러우니까... &n아무튼, 병력 손실은 안 좋은 거니까...

1000605812.english: That's enough! Stop messing around and let's hurry up and catch up. We don't have time for this.
1000605812.korean: 됐어! 장난치지 말고 빨리 따라가자. 이럴 시간 없어.

1000605813.english: Yes. Yes. I'll get it ready right away, so please calm down.
1000605813.korean: 네. 네. 금방 준비할 테니까, 진정해요.

1000605814.english: It's the sea... I've made it to the sea. I did it...

1000605815.english: Gotcha! You burden. What are you muttering to yourself?
1000605815.korean: 잡았다! 이 짐덩어리. 뭘 혼자 중얼거리고 있냐?

1000605816.english: Who, who are you?! Get off me!

1000605817.english: ...Constantia? This is Griffon. I found my target. I'll be back now.
1000605817.korean: ... 콘스탄챠? 여긴 그리폰. 목표 찾았어. 지금 복귀할게.

1000605818.english: ... ...I told you, you're on target? Okay. Go and see.

1000605820.english: I've been looking for you all night, haven't I? Anyway, I don't want to bother explaining. Just follow me.
1000605820.korean: 밤새 너 찾느라 완전 고생했거든? 아무튼, 설명하기 귀찮으니까. 얼른 따라와.

1000605821.english: No... Nong!! Don't you know what I meant by coming all the way to the beach? I didn't need any help from you in the first place.
1000605821.korean: 노... 농!! 넌 내가 해안가까지 온 게 무슨 뜻인지 모르겠니?&n애초에 네 도움 같은 거 전~혀. 필요 없었다는 거야.

1000605822.english: From here on out, I can swim by myself, so you don't have to worry about it.
1000605822.korean: 여기서부터는 나 혼자 헤엄쳐서 갈 수 있으니까, 넌 신경 쓸 필요 없어.

1000605824.english: See? Partner? Am I right? You owe me two cans of tuna? I told you this guy wouldn't listen.
1000605824.korean: 봤지? 파트너? 내 말 맞지? 나한테 참치캔 2개 빚진 거다?&n얘는 분명 말 안 들을 거라고 했잖아.

1000605825.english: ...even though they ran out of fuel, they refused to be rescued...that's really interesting... &n But, given the circumstances...excuse me.
1000605825.korean: ... 연료가 떨어졌는데도, 구조를 거부하다니... 정말 흥미롭군요...&n하지만, 지금은 상황이 상황이니 만큼... 실례할게요.

1000605826.english: Let go of this! I have no problem.
1000605826.korean: 이것 놓으세요! 전 아무 문제 없다고요.

1000605827.english: Yes. Yes. Let's say that's true. Anyway, Undine, you have to come with us...
1000605827.korean: 네. 네. 그렇다고 해두죠. 어쨌든, 운디네 씨는 우리와 같이 가주셔야...

1000605829.english: ...This is Night Angel. What's going on, Captain?
1000605829.korean: ... 여긴 나이트 앤젤. 무슨 일이죠 대장?

1000605830.english: ... ... &n Yes. Yes. Please stay still until I get there.
1000605830.korean: ... ... &n네. 네. 제가 갈 때까지 얌전히 있으세요.

1000605831.english: And if you don't take your hand off that button right now, I'm going to get in real trouble.
1000605831.korean: 그리고, 당장 그 버튼에서 손 안 때면 저한테 진짜 혼나는 수가 있어요.

1000605832.english: Huh? What is it? Is this Captain May? What's going on now?
1000605832.korean: 응? 뭐야? 메이 대장이야? 지금 무슨 일이래?

1000605833.english: Sorry, I don't think this is something to discuss with your new friend.
1000605833.korean: 미안해요. 새로 사귄 친구와 떠들 만한 내용은 아닌 것 같네요.

1000605834.english: And, this mission... how should I put it... ...was enjoyable in many ways. &n I hope we can meet again.
1000605834.korean: 그리고, 이번 임무는... 뭐라고 해야 할까요... ... 여러모로 즐거웠어요.&n다시 만날 수 있으면 좋겠네요.

1000605835.english: Why? Can't we go together? Doom Bringer always pretends to be busy, even though they're not doing anything.
1000605835.korean: 왜? 같이 못 가는 거야? 둠 브링어는 하는 것도 없으면서, 맨날 바쁜척해.

1000605836.english: Ah! Just a moment before you go! Right~. I heard a rumor a while ago, Captain May took it out on a remote island...
1000605836.korean: 아! 가기 전에 잠깐만! 있지~. 나 얼마 전에 소문으로 들었는데,&n메이 대장이 화풀이로 외딴 섬에다...

1000605837.english: Stop. That's a nasty rumor. Don't believe it. Common sense tells you that such a thing couldn't happen.
1000605837.korean: 그만. 질 나쁜 소문이네요. 믿지 마세요.&n상식적으로 그런 일이 있을 리 없잖아요?

1000605838.english: Okay... Is that how it comes out? I'll make it look like there were no two cans of tuna~. Tell me quickly~. Hurry up~.
1000605838.korean: 좋아... 그렇게 나오는 거지?&n참치캔 2개 없던 걸로 해줄게~. 얼른 말해줘~. 빨리~.

1000605839.english: Haha. It's no use making a fuss. &n If you don't have any more questions, I guess I should go.
1000605839.korean: 후후. 생떼 써도 소용없어요. &n더 질문할게 없다면, 전 그만 가봐야겠어요.

1000605840.english: ...Finally, the story about the Griffon's stealth capabilities... &n It was all a joke. Don't take it to heart. Well...
1000605840.korean: ... 마지막으로, 그리폰의 스텔스 성능을 가지고 했던 이야기는...&n전부 농담이니까. 마음에 담아두지 마세요. 그럼...

1000605841.english: You know that's not a joke, right? What the heck. She's gone...
1000605841.korean: 너 그거 농담 아닌 거 다 알거든?&n뭐야. 가버렸네...

1000605842.english: Let's go back too. I'd love to just play here all day, but Constantia's worried... I'll just hold back for a bit.
1000605842.korean: 우리도 돌아가자. 생각 같아선, 여기서 종일 놀려주고 싶은데&n콘스탄챠가 걱정하고 있으니까... 내가 조금 참지 뭐.

1000605843.english: Hehe. As expected~. I was right. I definitely reached my destination!
1000605843.korean: 후훗. 역시~. 내가 맞았어. 난 분명 목표지점에 도착했었다구!

1000605844.english: The other team members were confused, right? Right?
1000605844.korean: 다른 팀원들이 헷갈린 게 맞죠? 그렇죠?

1000605845.english: Yes... The rest of the team is returning now. &n We've added some sortie rules so we can be more careful to avoid this from happening again.
1000605845.korean: 네... 나머지 팀원 들은 지금 복귀 중이에요.&n출격 수칙을 추가해서, 앞으로는 이런 일 없도록 주의할게요.

1000605846.english: Today... You worked really hard by yourself. Don't think about anything and get some rest, Undine.
1000605846.korean: 오늘은... 혼자서 정말 수고 많았어요.&n아무 생각 말고 푹 쉬어요 운디네.

1000605847.english: Look~. There's no way this Undine would make such a foolish mistake, right?
1000605847.korean: 봐~. 이 운디네가 그런 어설픈 실수 같은 걸 할 리 없잖아?

1000605848.english: Ha... Are you an idiot? If you haven't met your teammates, you should have reported them right away! You went out alone like that, so I had a hard time too!
1000605848.korean: 하... 너 바보야? 팀원을 못 만났으면 바로 보고부터 해야지!&n그렇게 너 혼자 출격하는 바람에 나까지 고생했잖아!

1000605849.english: Nong! Idiot! That's rude. And... anyone can see that I'm several times better at calculating than you.
1000605849.korean: 농! 바보라니. 실례야.&n그리고... 누가 봐도 연산 능력으로는 내가 너보다 몇 배는 우수하거든?

1000605850.english: Ugh! Look at all the beating around the bush. This kid needs to be sent straight to Captain Marie and trained with the Brownies all summer.
1000605850.korean: 윽! 끝까지 말 돌리는 것 좀 봐. 얘는 바로 마리 대장님한테 보내서&n브라우니들이랑 같이 여름 내내 훈련받아야 돼.

1000605851.english: I'm so glad that Undine is safe. &n In that sense, would you like to have a celebration party just for us today?
1000605851.korean: 난 운디네 씨가 무사해서 정말 다행이라 생각해.&n그런 의미로, 오늘은 우리끼리 축하파티라도 할래?

1000605852.english: ...Are you kidding? I'm so tired today...? So...

1000605853.english: Hmm? I feel a party atmosphere coming on. What about my outfit? Will this be okay?
1000605853.korean: 음? 어디선가 파티 분위기가 느껴져요. &n복장은요? 이대로 문제없을까요?

1000605854.english: Hmm... what should I do? I heard the restaurant really worked hard to prepare it...
1000605854.korean: 음... 어쩌지? 식당에서 정말 열심히 준비했다고 들었는데...

1000605855.english: Très bien! A banquet to celebrate our return? A festival! Invite everyone!
1000605855.korean: 트레비앙! 복귀 후의 만찬인가요? 축제에요! 모두 초대하세요!

1000605858.english: If I miss the party, I'll miss my chance to thank you... Are you sure you're okay with that? Really? Seriously?
1000605858.korean: 파티를 놓치면, 내 감사 인사를 받을 기회도 사라지는데... 정말 괜찮아?&n정말? 진심으로?

1000605859.english: Ah! Really! Got it! Just go! &n You're going to harass me until I get there anyway, right?!
1000605859.korean: 아! 정말! 알았어! 가면 되잖아!&n넌 어차피 내가 갈 때까지 괴롭힐 생각이지?!

1000605860.english: It's really annoying! Undine, could you please walk a little further away? It's giving me goosebumps.
1000605860.korean: 귀찮아 정말!&n운디네 너는 좀 떨어져서 걸어 줄래? 소름 돋거든?

1000605861.english: Griffon~? By the way, can you drink wine? Griffon?
1000605861.korean: 그리폰~? 그런데, 포도주는 마실 수 있어? 그리폰?

1000605862.english: Well, there's nothing I can do about it~. The little one has no choice but to be taught step by step by this older sister. &n Black Hound, come quickly too.
1000605862.korean: 뭐, 어쩔 수 없네~. 꼬맹이는 이 언니가 하나하나 가르쳐 주는 수밖에 없지.&n블랙 하운드도 얼른 와.

1000605863.english: Then I'll call some more friends.
1000605863.korean: 그럼 저는 친구들을 좀 더 불러올게요.

1000605864.english: Thank goodness. Nothing much happened today. I'm really glad.
1000605864.korean: 다행이야. 오늘도 별일 없어서. 정말 다행이야.

1000605865.english: Hey! Did you just hear? I didn't hear there was a party tonight. &n Orca is the best, after all.
1000605865.korean: 햐! 방금 들으셨습니까? 오늘 파티 있다는 소식은 못 들었는데 말입니다.&n역시, 오르카가 제일 좋지 말입니다.

1000605866.english: Are you in a situation where you can just go out and play leisurely?! Find Undine right now! &n ... If Captain Marie hears about this... we're really finished!
1000605866.korean: 지금 한가하게 놀러 다닐 상황인가요?! 당장 운디네 씨부터 찾으세요!&n... 이번 일이 마리 대장 귀에 들어가면... 우린 정말 끝장이에요!

1000605867.english: Hey~. This is my first time sortieing with the Air Force, so I made a mistake. But still. Since Undine-sama returned safely, everything turned out well.
1000605867.korean: 에이~. 공군이랑 같이 출격하는 건 이번이 처음이라, 제가 실수했지 말입니다.&n그래도. 운디네님이 무사히 복귀하셨으니까. 결과적으로 다 잘 된 거지 말입니다.

1000605870.english: Uh... Ms. Undine... is... a member of the Navy... &n No. Forget what just happened. Just... just... run. Hurry up!
1000605870.korean: 우... 운디네 씨는... 해군... 해군 소속...&n아니에요. 방금 건 잊으세요. 그냥... 그냥... 뛰세요. 어서!

1000605872.english: Haa~! It's seriously way too hot here.
1000605872.korean: 하아~! 여기는 정말, 더워도 너무 덥다구요,

1000605873.english: As I was coming back, I was thinking: if I were stranded alone in a place like this, how long could I last? A month? Maybe... a week?
1000605873.korean: 복귀하면서 생각한 건데, 제가 이런 곳에 혼자 떨어져 있으면, &n얼마나 버틸 수 있을까요? 한 달? 어쩌면... 일주일?

1000605875.english: Oh my god! Come to think of it, there isn't even any cheese cream here. I probably won't last a day. Poor Undine will end up with nothing but bones... *Sob*...
1000605875.korean: 맙소사! 다시 생각해보니, 여긴 치즈크림조차 없다구요. &n아마 난 하루도 못 버틸 거야. 가엾은 운디네는 결국 뼈만 남겠지... 흐윽...

1000605876.english: ... Yes, I see... Now, if you could give us the reconnaissance report...
1000605876.korean: ... 네, 정말 그렇군요...&n이제, 정찰 보고를 해주시면...

1000605877.english: Well, this place is no different from other islands. Beaches! Crabs! Seagulls! Nothing but UV rays targeting the girl's skin and sea breezes.
1000605877.korean: 뭐, 이곳도 다른 섬이랑 다를 바 없어요.&n해변! 게! 갈매기! 소녀의 피부를 노리는 자외선과 바닷바람뿐이에요.

1000605878.english: In my opinion, it would be fine to return now. That is all. This was Captain Undine's report.
1000605878.korean: 제 의견으로는 이제 복귀해도 괜찮을 것 같은데요?&n이상. 운디네 대위의 보고였습니다~.

1000605879.english: If that is the Captain's reconnaissance report, I have no other opinion. Thank you for your hard work.
1000605879.korean: 대위의 정찰 내용이 그렇다면, 저도 다른 의견 없어요.&n수고 많으셨어요.

1000605880.english: Ooh! Alright. Time to hurry up and go! Chocolat! Party! Control tower? Control tower? Undine, please grant takeoff clearance.
1000605880.korean: 우훗! 좋아요. 얼른 가야지~! 쇼콜라! 파티!&n관제탑? 관제탑? 운디네 이륙 허가 바랍니다.

1000605881.english: Just a moment. We have to wait for Nereid. I will wait.

1000605882.english: No! Vice Captain! My skin is still under attack from UV rays right now!
1000605882.korean: 노~! 부함장님! 지금도 제 피부는 자외선 공격을 받고 있는걸요?!

1000605883.english: Ms. Nereid will be arriving soon. I know you want to return first, but please bear with me just a little longer. We are fellow members of the same unit, after all.
1000605883.korean: 네레이드씨가 곧 도착할 거예요. 먼저 복귀하고픈 마음은 알지만,&n조금만 참아주세요. 우린 같은 부대원이잖아요?

1000605884.english: But Neri is too noisy, so I don't want to be with her.
1000605884.korean: 그렇지만, 네리는 너무 시끄러워서 같이 있고 싶지 않은걸요?

1000605885.english: Honestly, Vice Commander, you think so too, right?

1000605887.english: Phew... When will our Vice Commander finally be honest? Will a month be enough? Or... a week?
1000605887.korean: 휴~ 우리 부함장님은 언제쯤 솔직해 질까? 한 달이면 될까? 아니면... 일주일?

1000605888.english: Ah~. I was just starting to get tired of chattering to myself... That's a relief. There's a Nereid over there.
1000605888.korean: 아~. 혼자 떠들기도 슬슬 지쳐가던 참이었는데... 다행이네요.&n저기 네레이드가 보이네요.

1000605889.english: Neri! Can't you come right away?

1000605890.english: Deck Combat Unit Neri! Making a cute and cool entrance! Friends, have you been waiting a long time?
1000605890.korean: 갑판 전투 유닛 네리! 귀엽고 멋지게 등장!&n친구들 오래 기다렸어?

1000605891.english: I bet you slipped away somewhere and had a blast, didn't you? You can't fool us.
1000605891.korean: 보나 마나, 어디로 빠져서 실컷 놀고 왔지? 우릴 속이면 못 써.

1000605892.english: Um, Captain Undine? It won't take a moment. Let me hear the reconnaissance report first.
1000605892.korean: 저, 운디네 대위? 잠깐이면 돼요. 정찰 내용부터 들을게요.

1000605893.english: Yes! Then, I will begin Nerineri's report!

1000605895.english: ... Hmm... That's a shame! We'll see the results next time!

1000605896.english: ...Ha. Why do I have to be in this situation?
1000605896.korean: ...하. 저는 왜 이러고 있어야 하는 걸까요?

1000605897.english: Oh! That was a little fun. Anyway, Neri's reconnaissance results! No problems found! There is nothing on the island.
1000605897.korean: 옷! 방금 건 조금 재밌었어. 아무튼,&n네리 정찰 결과! 아무 문제 없었습니다! 섬엔 아무것도 없어요.

1000605898.english: Haa... Anyway, Vice Captain, you heard that too, right?

1000605899.english: There's no way there would be anything unique on such a remote island...
1000605899.korean: 이런 외딴섬에 특이한 게 있을 리...

1000605900.english: Additionally, there was one distress call, but the signal was weak so I just ignored it!
1000605900.korean: 덧붙여서, 구조 요청이 한 건 있었는데,&n신호가 약해서 그냥 무시했습니다!

1000605902.english: Is that true, Horizon? Starting now, signal tracking begins. You’ve worked very hard, Nereid.
1000605902.korean: 그게 사실인가요? 호라이즌. 현 시간부로 신호 추적을 시작합니다.&n정말 고생하셨어요. 네레이드씨.

1000605903.english: Yes! I'll send you the coordinates and start the tour! Heehee~! Undine, hurry up and follow me.
1000605903.korean: 넵! 좌표 전달하고, 안내 시작하겠습니다!&n히~! 운디네도 얼른 따라와.

1000605904.english: Yes... I'm going. I'm saying I'm going...

1000605905.english: It's safe here now. Are you hurt anywhere?
1000605905.korean: 여긴 이제 안전해요. 다친 곳은 없나요?

1000605906.english: Ugh! I really thought I was going to be completely helpless!
1000605906.korean: 으아~! 정말 꼼짝없이 당하는 줄 알았어!

1000605907.english: But how is a soldier here? I'm really lucky today, aren't I? Or maybe not? I almost got caught by an Iron bug, so maybe it's only half good luck?
1000605907.korean: 근데, 어떻게 군인이 여기 있지? 나 오늘 운이 정말 좋은데?&n아닌가? 철충한테 잡힐 뻔했으니까, 반 정도 좋은 건가?

1000605908.english: Anyway, thank you so much! Oh wait! Get a grip, my name is Triaina. Feel free to call me whatever you like.
1000605908.korean: 아무튼, 너무 고마워~!&n아차! 정신 좀 봐, 내 이름은 '트리아이나.' 편하게 불러줘.

1000605909.english: I survived thanks to you! I wish I could repay you somehow... but I'm still broke, you know. Let's just make up for it with my thanks.
1000605909.korean: 덕분에 살았어! 뭔가 보답을 하면 좋겠지만... 이쪽은 아직 가난뱅이라서 말야.&n내 감사 인사로 대충 갚는 걸로 하자고.

1000605910.english: Ah, more importantly, I'm a bit tired from being chased, so if you don't mind, could you get me a bed? Preferably a soft one~.
1000605910.korean: 아, 그것보다 쫓기느라 좀 피곤해서 그런데&n괜찮으면 침대 하나 마련해 주겠어? 기왕이면 푹신한 걸로~.

1000605911.english: Um... regarding boarding permission, I need to ask the Commander...

1000605912.english: Thanks! Then! I'll request a room from that commander! Then where do I go? Is it this way?
1000605912.korean: 고마워! 그럼! 그 사령관이란 사람한테 방 하나 요청할게!&n그럼 어디로 가면 돼? 이쪽인가?

1000605913.english: Okay, wait! Hold on! Request boarding via communication...
1000605913.korean: 자, 잠깐! 기다려요! 통신으로 승선 요청을...

1000605914.english: Wow... is she a PECS employee too? PECS employees have this certain vibe... they look a little cheap. What do you think, Neri?
1000605914.korean: 워우... 쟤도 펙스 직원이지?&n펙스 직원은 특유의 느낌... 살짝 싼 티가 있어. 네리는 어떻게 생각해?

1000605915.english: Neri really likes her new friend. She doesn't seem like she'd act all high and mighty.
1000605915.korean: 네리는 새로운 친구가 진짜 마음에 드는데?&n잘난 척도 안 할 것 같고 말이야.

1000605916.english: Friends already? Seriously... do loud kids really have something in common? We haven't even talked to each other yet.
1000605916.korean: 벌써 친구? 정말... 시끄러운 애들 끼린 통하는 게 있나?&n서로 이야기를 해 본 것도 아니잖아?

1000605917.english: You don't know what you're talking about! True friends don't need things like that. What's needed is a feeling, I guess?
1000605917.korean: 모르시는 말씀! 진정한 친구는 그런 거 필요 없어.&n필요한 건 느낌이랄까?

1000605918.english: Ha. I don't know what you're talking about. Anyway, good luck.
1000605918.korean: 하. 무슨 말을 하는지 나는 모르겠네~. 아무튼 잘해봐.

1000605919.english: Wow! Sirene, is that really true? Then, if I just follow you, I can meet that commander?
1000605919.korean: 햐! 세이렌 씨 그게 정말이야?&n그럼, 당신만 따라가면 그 사령관을 만날 수 있단 거지?

1000605920.english: .... Yes. Of course. I'm not sure if the Commander will welcome me... but he probably will.
1000605920.korean: .... 네. 그럼요. &n사령관님이 반겨주실지는 모르... 아마 반겨주실 거예요.

1000605921.english: Ha! Look at this. Seeing this proves my luck isn't completely over yet! Hehe. Alright. Then I can start the plan in earnest.
1000605921.korean: 하~! 이것 봐. 이런 걸 보면 내 운이 완전히 끝난 건 아니라고! &n헤헤. 좋았어. 그럼 계획을 본격적으로 시작할 수 있겠네.

1000605922.english: ... A small cluster of Iron bug discovered, 1 rescued. That is all. This concludes the Sirene report.
1000605922.korean: ... 소수의 철충 군집 발견, 구출 인원 1명.&n이상. 세이렌 보고 마치겠습니다.

1000605923.english: - I’ve been through a lot of things, but a situation like this is really baffling.
1000605923.korean: - 이런저런 일을 많이 겪어 봤지만, 지금 같은 상황은 정말 당황스럽다.

1000605924.english: Really? Really? It's a human?! Is this real? Can I touch it?! I'll just give you a light touch! Who do I need permission to get to touch you? How far is touching allowed?
1000605924.korean: 진짜? 진짜? 인간이잖아?! 이거 진짜야? 만져봐도 돼?! 가벼운 터치만 할게!&n만지려면, 누구 허락받아야 해? 터치는 어디까지 허락되는 거야?

1000605925.english: - ... In my experience, due to the shock at the time, it takes quite a while for the rescued personnel to adjust to the Orca...
1000605925.korean: - ... 내 경험상, 구조 받은 인원들은 당시의 충격으로 오르카에 적응하는 시간이 꽤...

1000605926.english: Ooh! This... this is definitely a real human. I can vouch for it. Ah! Sorry! I touched it without even sanitizing my hands? Let's sanitize first...
1000605926.korean: 오옷! 이건... 이건, 진짜 인간이 맞아. 내가 보증할 수 있어.&n아! 미안! 손 소독도 안 하고 막 만졌네? 일단 소독부터...

1000605927.english: - ... This bioroid rescued by Horizon is a PECS employee with a very bright personality. She belongs to the Golden Workers, and her name is Tri...
1000605927.korean: - ... 호라이즌이 구조한 이 바이오로이드는 매우 밝은 성격의 펙스 직원.&n소속은 골든 워커즈, 이름은 트리...

1000605928.english: Agh! You startled me! It didn't mean anything. I just wanted to grope a little.
1000605928.korean: 으아! 깜짝이야! 별 의미는 없었어.&n조금 더듬고 싶었을 뿐이야.

1000605929.english: Hey... but you know what? If a human talks like that, I look like a weirdo. Could you apologize politely?
1000605929.korean: 저기... 그런데 말야. 인간이 그렇게 말하면, 내가 이상한 녀석처럼 보이잖아.&n정중하게 사과해 줄래?

1000605930.english: Um... if you act rudely like that, it puts me in a difficult position.
1000605930.korean: 저기... 그런 무례한 행동을 하시면, 제가 곤란해요.

1000605931.english: First, I will assign you a place to stay, so why don't you get some rest there? I heard you haven't been able to sleep for several weeks.
1000605931.korean: 우선 숙소를 배정해 드릴 테니, 그곳에서 조금 휴식을 취하시는 게 어떨까요? &n몇 주 동안 잠도 주무시지 못했다고 들었는데.

1000605932.english: Oh, thank you so much, Sirene! But I'll just have to accept your kindness. I don't have time to rest. An adventure awaits me!
1000605932.korean: 아이~ 정말 고마워 세이렌~! 하지만 마음만 받을게.&n난 쉬고 있을 시간이 없거든. 내 앞엔 모험이 기다리고 있단 말야!

1000605933.english: I have some really, really top-tier information, you know? I'm thinking of making a deal with it. Who is the owner of this submarine right now?
1000605933.korean: 내가 정~말! 고급 정보를 가지고 있거든? 이걸로 거래를 해 볼 생각인데,&n지금 이 잠수함의 주인이 누구야?

1000605934.english: If you are looking for the owner of Orca No. 1, it is the Commander standing in front of you right now.
1000605934.korean: 오르카 1호의 주인을 찾으시는 거라면, 지금 앞에 계시는 사령관님이세요.

1000605936.english: Excuse me~? Sorry, but isn't there anyone else?

1000605937.english: No, how should I... explain this? Um... expertise? It... seems a little lacking...
1000605937.korean: 아니, 이걸... 뭐라고 설명 해야 하지?&n그... 전문성? 그런 게... 조금 부족해 보여서...

1000605938.english: Sirene. Is it really... that person who has this submarine?
1000605938.korean: 세이렌. 정말 이 잠수함을 가지고 있는 게.&n... 저... 분이야?

1000605939.english: Yes, because our Commander is the only survivor on Earth.
1000605939.korean: 네, 우리 사령관님만이, 지구의 유일한 생존자 시니까요.

1000605940.english: Ah... I see... So that's how it ended up. I understand perfectly. The world has been destroyed... And only the Commander remains...
1000605940.korean: 아... 그렇구나... 결국 그렇게 되었구나. 퍼펙트하게 이해했어.&n세계가 망해버렸구나... 그리고 사령관님만 남으셨구나...

1000605941.english: Hehe! Commander? Are you sulking? I didn't mean to... Are you... perhaps sulking?
1000605941.korean: 에헷! 사령관님? 삐졌어요? 그럴 의도는 없었는데... 혹시... 삐졌어요?

1000605942.english: Our commander is awesome! He is as understanding as the ocean!
1000605942.korean: 우리 사령관님 멋져! 이해심이 바다 같아!

1000605943.english: Straight into business! The Commander is so charismatic! Totally professional!!
1000605943.korean: 바로 비즈니스로 진입! &n사령관님 카리스마 있으셔! 완전 프로페셔널해!!

1000605944.english: Alright then! I'll get started right away. Please bear with me even if I talk a little long-winded! Uh... can I start now? You're listening, right?
1000605944.korean: 자~! 그럼 바로 시작할게요. 말이 조금 길어도 귀엽게 봐주세요~!&n어... 지금 시작해도 돼? 듣고 있죠?

1000605945.english: - The girl smiled broadly and began to tell a story.

1000605946.english: - Triaina was originally an employee of the Golden Workers, who conducted 'deep sea exploration'. It seems she mainly collected substances of scientific value from the deep sea.
1000605946.korean: - 트리아이나는 본디 '심해 탐사'를 하던 골든 워커즈의 직원이었다.&n그녀는 주로 심해에서 과학적 가치가 있는 물질 등을 수집했던 모양이다.

1000605947.english: - Up to this point, it is the story of an ordinary PECS bioroid.

1000605948.english: - Immediately after the War of Annihilation, she had aspects that were slightly different from other Bio-roids. For example...
1000605948.korean: - 멸망 전쟁 직후의 그녀는 다른 바이오 로이드들과는 조금 다른 면이 있었다. &n예를 들어...

1000605949.english: ... I didn't know what to do, so I just stared at the sea for a whole month, you know? Then one day, suddenly, it hit me like a flash!
1000605949.korean: ... 그렇게 뭘 해야 할지도 모르고, 한 달 내내 바다만 바라보고 있었거든?&n그러던 어느 날 갑자기 정신이 빠밤! 하고 들었지 뭐야.

1000605950.english: Well, that's how the treasure hunting started. Ta-da!
1000605950.korean: 뭐, 그렇게 트레저 헌팅을 시작했지. 빠밤! 하고 말이야.

1000605951.english: Hmm... isn't that because 'adventurer's blood' flows within me?
1000605951.korean: 음... 그건, 내 안에 '모험가의 피'가 흐르고 있기 때문이 아닐까?

1000605952.english: - Triaina chose 'adventure' among many options, and seemed quite satisfied with her life.
1000605952.korean: - 트리아이나는 많은 선택지들 중에서, '모험'을 선택했고,&n그런 자신의 삶에 꽤 만족한 듯했다.

1000605953.english: Huh? No way...! Bio-roids aren't allowed to go treasure hunting on their own?
1000605953.korean: 응? 설마...! 바이오로이드는 멋대로 트레저 헌팅 하면 안 되는 거야?

1000605954.english: H-heh... right? Thanks, Commander. Well then, from here on, it's a story about treasure, so you need to listen carefully.
1000605954.korean: 히... 그치? 고마워 사령관. 그럼 여기서부터는 보물 이야기니까.&n집중해서 들어야 해.

1000605955.english: - Triaina unfolded the old document with an exaggerated gesture.
1000605955.korean: - 트리아이나는 과장된 몸짓으로, 낡은 문서를 펼쳐 보였다.

1000605956.english: Actually, this... should probably be called a 'Black River' secret document rather than a treasure map... but let's skip the trivial details!
1000605956.korean: 사실 이건... 보물 지도라기 보다, '블랙리버'의 기밀문서라고 불러야겠지만...&n사소한 건 패스!

1000605957.english: Guess what was written here? It was... information about the safe! The safe that Black River designed in case of an emergency.
1000605957.korean: 여기 뭐가 적혀있었게? 그건 바로... 금고에 대한 정보였어!&n블랙리버가 만약의 사태에 대비해서 설계한 금고 말이야.

1000605958.english: - Speaking of 'Black River'... it was definitely a massive mercenary corporation that produced countless combat-type bioroids.
1000605958.korean: - '블랙리버'라고 하면... 분명 수많은 전투형 바이오로이드들을 배출한, &n거대 용병 기업이었지.

1000605959.english: Okay, see the spot marked here? This is the island where I was rescued.
1000605959.korean: 자아~ 여기 표시된 곳 보이지? 여기가 내가 구출된 그 섬이야.

1000605960.english: Based on my investigation using the documents, it is certain that the 'Rioboros Family'—that is, the 'Black River's' 'vault'—is located on this island.
1000605960.korean: 내가 문서를 가지고 조사한 결과!&n이 섬에 '리오보로스 가문', 그러니까 '블랙리버'의 '금고'가 있는 게 확실해.

1000605961.english: So, it means that anyone who just follows this map can reach the 'Last Vault of Humanity' hidden by the Black River.
1000605961.korean: 그러니까, 누구든지 이 지도만 따라가면. &n블랙리버가 숨겨놓은 '인류 최후의 금고'로 갈 수 있다는 뜻이지.

1000605962.english: But when I actually got there, I realized there were way too many Iron Bugs on the island! Luckily, a Sirene was there just in time, so I managed to save my life, though. Hehe~.
1000605962.korean: 그런데, 막상 도착하고 보니 섬에 철충들이 너무 많은 거 있지?&n때마침 세이렌이 있어서 목숨은 건졌지만 말이야. 헤헷~.

1000605963.english: That's all for my story. If you help me, I'll guide you to the vault. And then everyone will be happy!
1000605963.korean: 내 이야기는 여기까지야. 날 도와주면, 내가 금고까지 안내해 줄게.&n그리고 모두가 행복해지는 거지!

1000605964.english: How about it, Commander? Doesn't it make you itch to get moving? A massive vault hidden by a corporation... Ah... just imagining it makes me so happy!
1000605964.korean: 어때? 사령관님? 몸이 막 근질거리지 않아?&n기업이 숨겨둔 거대한 금고라니... 아... 상상만 해도 너무 좋아!

1000605965.english: - The 'Last Vault of Humanity' said to have been hidden by Black River. It’s a bit of a apology to Triaina, who is smiling so brightly, but...
1000605965.korean: - 블랙리버가 숨겨두었다는 '인류 최후의 금고'.&n해맑게 웃고 있는 트리아이나에게는 조금 미안한 이야기지만...

1000605966.english: - am not interested in treasure hunting.

1000605967.english: - To be precise, I didn't feel the need for that treasure.
1000605967.korean: - 정확히 말하자면, 나는 그 보물이라는 것의 필요성을 느끼지 못했다.

1000605968.english: - Even if the safe Triaina is talking about exists, it would likely be nothing but currency that is no longer in circulation and gold bars. I have no interest in such items.
1000605968.korean: - 트리아이나가 말하는 금고가 존재한다고 쳐도, &n이제는 더 이상 통용되지 않는 화폐와, 금괴 따위가 전부 일 터. 나는 관심이 없는 물건들이다.

1000605969.english: - However. If I participate in a treasure hunt...
1000605969.korean: - 하지만. 만약, 내가 트레저 헌팅에 참가한다면...

1000605970.english: - It could be a suitable excuse for the Orca personnel, exhausted from training and combat, to bask in the sun on a southern island.
1000605970.korean: - 훈련과 전투로 지친 오르카의 인원들이 남국의 섬에서 햇볕을 쬐며 쉴 수 있는&n적당한 핑곗거리가 될 수도 있겠지.

1000605971.english: - No need to think about it any further. Orca needs a vacation, if only for the sake of the exhausted personnel.
1000605971.korean: - 더 생각할 필요 없군. 지쳐있는 인원들을 위해서라도, 오르카에는 휴가가 필요해.

1000605973.english: Uh... Commander? I have to go now. Someone might snatch you away first.
1000605973.korean: 어... 사령관? 나 이제 가봐야 되는데? 누가 먼저 채갈 수도 있단 말야.

1000605974.english: ... The Commander is not the type to waste troops on things like this. Follow me to the quarters...
1000605974.korean: ... 사령관님은 이런 일에 병력을 낭비하는 분이 아니세요.&n저를 따라 숙소로...

1000605976.english: Huh?! What is it? What is it?

1000605978.english: Aha! Alright... Then, shall we take our time talking inside? Captain?
1000605978.korean: 아하! 좋아...&n그러면, 안에서 천천히 이야기를 나눠볼까요? 캡틴?

1000605979.english: - I arrived at the beach, but the sunlight was so bright that I couldn't open my eyes properly for a while.
1000605979.korean: - 해변에 도착했지만, 햇살이 너무 밝아 나는 한동안 눈을 제대로 뜰 수 없었다.

1000605980.english: - The expressions on the faces of the team members standing blankly on the sand were not much different from mine. Each and every one of them was frowning slightly and staring blankly at the horizon.
1000605980.korean: - 모래를 딛고 멍하니 선 대원들의 표정도 나와 별반 다르지 않았다.&n하나같이 얼굴을 조금씩 찡그리고, 멍하니 지평선을 바라보고 있을 뿐.

1000605981.english: It's the beach, you know!? This is exactly what summer is all about!! Summer beach! It's absolutely amazing!!
1000605981.korean: 해변이지 말입니다!? 이게 바로 여름이지 말입니다!!&n서머 비치! 끝내주지 말입니다!!

1000605983.english: Yes, it's a really wonderful beach...

1000605984.english: ... ... For now... as long as that excited Brownie doesn't cause any trouble... &nAh!!! Your Excellency the Commander?!
1000605984.korean: ... ... 아직까진... 저렇게 신난 브라우니가 사고만 안 친다면... &n아!!! 사령관 각하?!

1000605985.english: Ma, Marie, Leprechaun 1058 of the 4th Corps! Awaiting instructions! Your Excellency, Commander! Please take care of your safety until the island is secured.
1000605985.korean: 마, 마리 4 군단 소속 레프리콘 1058! 지시 대기 중입니다!&n사령관 각하! 섬을 확보할 때까지, 안전에 유의해주시기 바랍니다.

1000605986.english: - The leprechaun was still very tense.
1000605986.korean: - 레프리콘은 여전히 힘이 많이 들어가 있었다.

1000605988.english: You really need to be careful with gun management at the beach, okay? If sand gets in, your machine gun is 100% going to jam!
1000605988.korean: 해변에서는 총기 관리에 주의하셔야지 말입니다?&n모래 들어가면 경기관총은 백퍼 잼 걸리지 말임다!

1000605989.english: - After finishing her words, Brownie started running around the beach with a bright, innocent expression. Was she unable to contain her overflowing energy...?
1000605989.korean: - 말을 마친 브라우니는 해맑은 표정으로 해변을 뛰어다니기 시작했다.&n넘치는 에너지를 주체하지 못한 걸까...

1000605991.english: Wait! Don't wander around alone like that! And suddenly... oh... I said don't take off your clothes!
1000605991.korean: 잠깐! 그렇게 혼자 돌아다니지 마세요!&n갑자기 오... 옷을 벗지 말라고요!

1000605993.english: - Perrault was having a hard time accepting the absurd situation of "waking up to find myself on the beach."
1000605993.korean: - 페로는 '자고 일어났더니 해변이었다.'라는 황당한 상황을 받아들이는데&n애를 먹고 있었다.

1000605994.english: - The Orca crew members disembarking from the boat one by one, looking around.
1000605994.korean: - 두리번거리며 보트에서 하나둘씩, 상륙하는 오르카의 대원들.

1000605995.english: Your Majesty? What business do you have on such a wonderful island? And perhaps... under the sunset on the beach... th... th... th... th...
1000605995.korean: 폐하? 이런 멋진 섬에 무슨 용무가 있으신 거죠? &n혹시... 해변의 석양 아래에서... 고... 고... ㅂ...

1000605996.english: Ah... if possible, just the two of us, His Majesty.... Ugh! Be careful! Miss Night Angel!
1000605996.korean: 아... 가능하면, 폐하와 단둘이서만....&n으읏! 조심하세요! 나이트 앤젤 양!

1000605997.english: It's a minor accident. Just a very coincidence. Hmph, it flies quite far even with something that heavy attached.
1000605997.korean: 가벼운 사고예요. 아주 우연한.&n훗, 저렇게 무거운 걸 달고도 멀리도 날아가는군요.

1000605998.english: I did hear you came to this island. It did look fun... though... I wonder how those fools with hearts full of passion will react... Well, good luck, Commander.
1000605998.korean: 이 섬으로 온 건 듣긴 했어요. 재밌어 보이긴 하던데...&n가슴이 열정으로 가득 찬 바보들이 어떻게 반응할지... 뭐, 열심히 해 봐요 사령관님.

1000605999.english: - Night Angel somehow left behind some ominous words and flew away.
1000605999.korean: - 나이트 앤젤은 어쩐지 불길한 말을 남기고 날아가 버렸다.

1000606000.english: Oh my~. A midsummer island. Who on earth came up with such a cute idea?
1000606000.korean: 어머~. 한여름의 섬이라니.&n이런 깜찍한 발상은 대체 누가 했을까?

1000606001.english: Huh? What do you think, Commander?

1000606002.english: Hehe. Well, if the Commander says so, then I suppose that’s how it is. Alright! Then I’ll be the first to ignite my passion! Today I am Sea Wolf! Here I go!!!
1000606002.korean: 후후. 뭐~ 사령관이 그렇다면, 그런 거겠지.&n좋아! 그럼 나부터 열정을 불태우겠어! 오늘의 난 시울프! 간다!!!

1000606003.english: Excuse me for a moment, Your Excellency the Commander.

1000606004.english: - A Valkyrie brushing past me. I feel like... I should point something out to her.
1000606004.korean: - 내 옆을 스쳐가는 발키리. 뭔가... 지적을 해야 할 것 같은 기분이 든다.

1000606005.english: Yes, Your Excellency. Did you call me?

1000606006.english: - Valkyrie smiled broadly as she looked around the beach for a moment.
1000606006.korean: - 해변을 잠시 둘러보던 발키리는 시원하게 미소 지었다.

1000606007.english: think it will be good training, Your Excellency.
1000606007.korean: 좋은 훈련이 될 것 같습니다. 각하.

1000606008.english: - After the Valkyrie disappeared like that... anyway, it was only after the boat made several round trips that all the personnel to land were able to board the island.
1000606008.korean: - 발키리가 그렇게 사라진 후...&n어쨌든 보트가 몇 차례 왕복하고 나서야, 상륙할 인원들이 모두 섬에 오를 수 있었다.

1000606009.english: - While many people were standing bewildered on the beach, Triaina stepped onto a makeshift platform with a triumphant expression.
1000606009.korean: - 많은 인원들이 해변에서 어리둥절해 하고 있는 사이,&n트리아이나가 의기양양한 표정을 한 채, 급조된 단상 위로 올라섰다.
